packageSummary:
**Summary:** The 'Manmohak Bali - Janmashtami Special' package is a 7-day tour covering the beautiful island of Bali, Indonesia. The itinerary includes visits to Kintamani, Ubud Village, Tanah Lot Floating Temple, Tegenungan Waterfall, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, water sports, and cultural experiences, including a Kecak dance performance. The package includes return economy class airfare, accommodations at specified hotels, and meals as per the itinerary.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Bali
- Arrive at Denpasar Airport and meet the representative.
- Transfer to the hotel and check-in.
- Leisure time to explore the island.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 2:** Kintamani and Ubud Village Tour
- Post breakfast, start the tour with a visit to Kintamani.
- Visit the traditional markets and purchase gold and silver ware.
- Proceed to Ubud Village and visit the refined selection of temples and historical features.
- Return to the hotel and spend the overnight in Bali.

**Day 3:** Bali Swing and Tanah Lot Sunset Tour
- Post breakfast, proceed to Bali Swing.
- Enjoy the exciting experiences and amazing views.
- Arrive at Tanah Lot Floating Temple for sunset.
- Return to the hotel and spend the overnight in Bali.

**Day 4:** Half Day Water Sports at Tanjung Benoa
- Today enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to the beach at Tanjung Benoa near Nusa Dua Bali.
- Enjoy the water sport activities, including banana boat, parasailing, and jet ski.
- Proceed to Ulluwatu Temple and witness the Kecak dance performance.

**Day 5:** Bali: Half Day Tour To Tegenungan Waterfall & Shopping
- Post breakfast, proceed to Tegenungan Waterfall.
- Visit the beautiful waterfall and enjoy the scenic views.
- Proceed to the shopping area and purchase souvenirs.

**Day 6:** Bali: Visit The Gate of Heaven
- Today will leave early morning will have packed breakfast and proceed to visit The Gate of Heaven.
- Visit the Pura Lempuyang Luhur temple and enjoy the scenic views.

**Day 7:** Depart Bali
- This morning after breakfast, you will be transferred to the airport for your onward flight home.

**Summary:** The 'Himachal Senior Citizen Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Chandigarh, Manali, and Shimla. The itinerary includes visits to Sukhna Lake, Rock Garden, Elante Mall, Naggar Castle Art Gallery, Vashisht Temple, Kufri, and the Himalayan Nature Park, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and shopping areas.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Chandigarh
- Arrival at Chandigarh Airport
- Complimentary transfer to Regenta Central Cassia Chandigarh
- Guided tour of Chandigarh: Visit Sukhna Lake, Rock Garden, Elante Mall, and local Punjabi food in Sector 17 markets

**Day 2:** Manali
- Drive to Manali (300 KMS / APPROX 08-09 HRS)
- Visit Atal Tunnel, Sissu Waterfall, and Solang Valley
- Enjoy a Ropeway ride and admire the Himalayan mountains

**Day 3:** Manali
- Visit Naggar Castle Art Gallery and Vashisht Temple for hot sulphur springs
- Enjoy the scenic beauty of Manali and relax at the resort

**Day 4:** Shimla
- Drive to Shimla (290 KMS / APPROX 08-09 HRS)
- Visit Kufri, Indira Bungalow, and Himalayan Zoo
- Stroll on the famous Mall Road to view Christ Church, Scandal Point, and The Ridge

**Day 5:** Shimla
- Visit Shimla and enjoy the scenic beauty of the town
- Relax at the resort and enjoy the evening

**Day 6:** Shimla
- Visit Kufri and the Himalayan Nature Park
- Enjoy the scenic beauty of Shimla and relax at the resort

**Day 7:** Chandigarh Departure
- Depart for Chandigarh Airport at 09:00 hrs
- Arrive Airport and drop off for onward journey

**Price:** 31990.0

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in comfortable hotels on twin/triple/Single sharing basis
- All Meal (06 Breakfast, 06 Lunch, 06 Dinner)
- Evening Hi Tea with cookie
- Monument entrance fee as per itinerary
- Per Day 500 Ml Per Water Bottle
- Professional Tour Manager (Subject to Group size of then 15 pax)
- Travel Insurance (for age below 69yrs)
- Travel by comfortable A/C or non A/C small cars or Tempo Travellers or Mini Buses or big buses depending on the respective tour group size

**Exclusions:**

- GST will be applicable as per prevailing rates
- Entrance ticket
- Any increase in airfare, airport tax, fuel surcharge etc.
- Any up gradation in airline class, vehicle, hotel or hotel room category
- Cost of Pre/Post tour hotel accommodation
- Any extra expense incurred due to any forced majeure situation before the tour departure or during the tour, such as change in airline schedule, route or operation, changing the tour date, change in hotel etc.
- Personal expense like porter age, laundry, telephone, shopping, alcoholic beverages, extra mineral water or food which is not a part of group’s set meal menu
- Any extra cost incurred due to illness, accident, hospitalization or any personal emergency
- Cost of any optional activity or service
- Anything specifically not mentioned in the ‘tour price includes’

**Supplement Cost:**

- Full Tour Private Vehicle Supplement
- Dzire /Etios /Indigo @9900/- Per Vehicle
- Ertiga @ 16900/- Per Vehicle
- Toyota Innova Crysta @19900/- Per Vehicle
- 01N- Chandigarh Stay Regenta Place Mohali including (One Way Transfer, Breakfast & Dinner)
- INR 9,900 per Single Room per night
- INR 10900 per Double Room per night
- INR 3590 per extra bed per night
- INR 3050 per child without bed per night
- River Side Dinner with Bonfire At Manali
- 9900 Per Couple
- Jeep Safari Blue Mountain At Manali
- 7200 Per Couple
- Jeep Safari Hamta Pass At Manali
- 5500 Per Couple

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Darjeeling 5N' package is a 6-day tour covering Gangtok and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, and Tshangu Lake, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and handicraft shops.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and transfer to Gangtok (130 Kms / 04 Hrs).
- Check-in at the hotel and spend the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Gangtok
- Visit Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, and Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom.
- Enjoy a leisurely walk in the evening.

**Day 3:** Gangtok
- Visit Tshangu Lake (43 km / 03 hours) and Baba Mandir.
- Enjoy a leisurely walk in the evening.

**Day 4:** Gangtok
- Spend the day at leisure or explore the local markets and handicraft shops.
- Enjoy a farewell dinner in the evening.

**Day 5:** Departure from Gangtok
- Check-out of the hotel and transfer to NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport (130 km / 04 hours).
- Depart for your onward connection or way back home.

**Day 6:** Departure from Bagdogra Airport
- Depart from Bagdogra Airport for your onward connection or way back home.

**Summary:** The 'Amazing Armenia' package is a 7-day tour covering the city of Yerevan and its surrounding areas. The itinerary includes visits to the Tsitsernakaberd Monument, Cascade complex, Blue Mosque, Lake Sevan, Dilijan, Garni, Geghard, Ararat valley, Khor Virap, Noravank, and Tsaghkadzor. Participants will enjoy guided tours, visits to carpet factories, and shopping in Yerevan. The package includes 6 nights' stay at selected hotels, daily breakfast, airport transfers, and local taxes.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Yerevan
- Arrive at Yerevan airport and transfer to hotel
- Check-in at hotel and overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 2:** Yerevan City Tour
- Enjoy breakfast in hotel
- Visit Tsitsernakaberd Monument, Cascade complex, Blue Mosque, and other attractions in Yerevan
- Overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 3:** Yerevan - Lake Sevan - Dilijan
- Drive to Lake Sevan and visit Sevanavank Monastery
- Visit Dilijan, also known as "Armenian Switzerland"
- Overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 4:** Yerevan - Carpet Factory - Garni - Geghard
- Visit Armenian carpet factory and watch the production of handmade rugs
- Visit Garni, the only remaining Pagan temple in Armenia
- Visit Geghard monastery, a unique caved monastery
- Overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 5:** Yerevan - Ararat valley - Khor Virap - Noravank
- Drive to Ararat valley and visit Khor Virap Church
- Visit Noravank Monastery complex
- Overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 6:** Yerevan - Tsaghkadzor - Shopping in Yerevan
- Drive to Tsaghkadzor and visit Kecharis monastery
- Visit Fruit Market and Vernissage, an open-air exhibition-market
- Overnight stay in Yerevan

**Day 7:** Departure
- Transfer to airport for flight back home

**Summary:** The 'Chitramoy Europe - Durga Puja Special' package is a 15-day tour covering London, Paris, Belgium, Germany, Switzerland, Italy, and Austria. The itinerary includes visits to Tower of London, Madame Tussauds, London Eye, Eiffel Tower, Seine River Cruise, Versailles Palace, Mini Europe, Cheese farm, Amsterdam canal cruise, Cologne Cathedral, Rhine River Cruise, Black Forest, Rhine Falls, Jungfraujoch, Mt. Titlis, Lucerne, Innsbruck, Venice, Florence, Rome, and Pisa, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside London Airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided tour of London: See the Buckingham Palace, Hyde Park, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.

**Day 2:** London
- Guided city tour of London: Visit the Tower of London, Madame Tussauds, and London Eye.
- Enjoy a ride on the London Eye.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Take the high-speed train – Eurostar and cross the English Channel to arrive in Paris.
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides, and Champs Elysees.
- Enjoy a cruise on the Seine River.

**Day 4:** Paris
- Proceed for a guided tour of Versailles Palace with private apartments, Opera Hall, the Chapel & Hall of Mirrors.
- Visit the Eiffel Tower 2nd level.

**Day 5:** Belgium
- Visit Mini Europe – Europe in Miniature.
- Proceed to Brussels for an Orientation Tour: Enjoy free time at Grand Place and see the famous Manneken Pis statue with a photo stop at Atomium.

**Day 6:** Belgium
- Visit a cheese farm and a wooden shoe workshop.
- Enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass–topped boat.

**Day 7:** Germany
- Visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on the river Rhine.

**Day 8:** Switzerland
- Visit the Black Forest region, known for its dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- See the Rhine falls.

**Day 9:** Switzerland
- Day at leisure OR Excursion to Jungfraujoch with lunch and Interlaken (Optional).
- Visit Mt. Titlis and the Ice Palace.

**Day 10:** Switzerland
- Visit Mt. Titlis.
- Proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives, and chocolates.

**Day 11:** Innsbruck
- Visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- Orientation Tour of Innsbruck: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 12:** Venice
- Visit St. Mark’s Square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile, and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 13:** Florence
- Guided walking tour of Florence: See the Duomo, the Campanile, the Baptistery with its Gates of Paradise, and Piazza Della Signoria.

**Day 14:** Rome
- Guided city tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed) including a visit to the Vatican Museum, Sistine Chapel, St. Peter’s Basilica, and St. Peter’s Square.

**Day 15:** Pisa
- See the world-famous leaning tower of Pisa.
- Fly back home with pleasant memories!

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Gangtok Pelling Darjeeling Kalimpong' package is a 7-day tour covering Gangtok, Pelling, and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, Tshangu Lake, Baba Mandir, Yuksom, Darjeeling Ropeway Ride, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and tea estates.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Gangtok
- Arrive at NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport and transfer to Gangtok (130 Kms / 04 Hrs)
- Check-in at the hotel and overnight stay

**Day 2:** Gangtok
- Full day sightseeing covering Rumtek Monastery, Jhakri Water Fall, Do-rul Chhorten, Research Institute of Tibetology, Directorate of Handicraft & Handloom, and Flower Show
- Overnight stay in Gangtok

**Day 3:** Gangtok
- Excursion to Baba Mandir & Tshangu Lake (43 km / 03 hours)
- Back to Gangtok and overnight stay

**Day 4:** Pelling
- Transfer to Pelling (116 Km / 04 hours)
- Overnight stay in Pelling

**Day 5:** Pelling
- Excursion to Yuksom (5840 Ft / 1780 Mts, 35 Kms / 02 Hrs)
- Visit Darap Village, Rimbi Water fall & Hydro Project, Khecheopalri Lake, and Kanchanjunga Water fall

**Day 6:** Darjeeling
- Transfer to Darjeeling (6710 Ft / 2046 Mts, 125 Kms / 05 to 06 Hrs)

**Day 7:** Darjeeling

- Overnight stay in Darjeeling

**Day 8:** Departure from Darjeeling
- Check-out of the hotel and transfer to NJP Station / Bagdogra Airport for onward connection or way back home.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Himachal - Amritsar  Dalhousie  Dharamshala - Ex-Amritsar' package is a 7-day tour covering Amritsar, Dalhousie, and Dharamshala. The itinerary includes visits to Gobindgarh Fort, Sadda Pind, Golden Temple, ISKCON temple, Khajjiar, Panjpulla, Subash Bowli, Stature Falls, St John in the Wilderness Church, The War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, Bhagsunath Temple, and Dal Lake, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and visits to local markets and scenic spots.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Amritsar
- Arrive at Amritsar on own and proceed to your hotel.
- Rest of the day free for leisure.
- Overnight at hotel in Amritsar.

**Day 2:** Amritsar
- After breakfast, proceed for half-day sightseeing of Amritsar.
- Visit Gobindgarh Fort, Sadda Pind, Golden Temple, and ISKCON temple.
- In the evening, enjoy the Attari-Wagah border ceremony.
- Overnight at hotel in Amritsar.

**Day 3:** Amritsar to Dalhousie
- After breakfast, drive to Dalhousie (190 kms/Approx 5 hrs).
- Upon arrival, check in at a hotel.
- Rest of the day free for leisure activities.
- Visit Mall road.
- Overnight at hotel in Dalhousie.

**Day 4:** Dalhousie
- After breakfast, visit Khajjiar (20 kms/Approx 1 Hr).
- Visit Panjpulla, Subash Bowli, and Stature Falls.
- Overnight at hotel in Dalhousie.

**Day 5:** Dalhousie to Dharamshala
- After breakfast, drive to Dharamshala (121 kms/Approx 4 hrs).
- Upon arrival, check in at a hotel for dinner and overnight stay.

**Day 6:** Dharamshala
- After breakfast, visit the St John in the Wilderness Church, The War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, Bhagsunath Temple, and Dal Lake.
- Overnight at hotel in Dharamshala.

**Day 7:** Dharamshala to Amritsar Departure
- After breakfast, leave for Amritsar railway station / Amritsar airport for onward journey.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Himachal - Manali Dharamshala Dalhousie Chandigarh 8N' package is a 9-day tour covering Dalhousie, Dharamshala, Manali, and Chandigarh. The itinerary includes visits to Khajjiar, Panjpulla, Subash Bowli, Stature Falls, St John in the Wilderness Church, The War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, Bhagsunath Temple, Dal Lake, Hadimba temple, Nagar castle, Roerich Art Gallery, and Solang Valley. Participants will enjoy guided tours, local sightseeing, and visits to various attractions. The package includes accommodation in mentioned or similar hotels, daily breakfast and dinner, all transfers and sightseeing using A/c vehicle, and more.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Himachal - Manali Dharamshala Dalhousie' package is an 8-day tour covering Dalhousie, Dharamshala, and Manali. The itinerary includes visits to Panchpula, Subash Baoli, Bara Pathar, St. John's Church, Bakrota Hills, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and adventure activities such as paragliding, zorbing, and visiting the Solang Valley. The package also includes visits to the War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, and Bhagsunath Temple.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at Pathankot/Amritsar – Dalhousie
- Arrive at Pathankot/Amritsar on own and proceed to Dalhousie.
- Check into hotel in Dalhousie.
- Evening is free for leisure activities.

**Day 2:** Dalhousie – local sightseeing
- Proceed for full day tour of local sightseeing in Dalhousie.
- Visit Panchpula, Subash Baoli, Bara Pathar, St. John's Church, and Bakrota Hills.
- Evening is free for leisure activities.

**Day 3:** Dalhousie – Dharamshala
- Check out from hotel in Dalhousie and proceed to Dharamshala.
- Check into hotel in Dharamshala.
- Evening is free for leisure activities.

**Day 4:** Dharamshala
- Proceed for half day sightseeing tour of St. John in the Wilderness Church, The War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, Bhagsunath Temple, and Dal Lake.
- Overnight at hotel in Dharamshala.

**Day 5:** Dharamshala – Manali
- Check out from hotel in Dharamshala and proceed to Manali.
- Check into hotel in Manali.
- Evening is free for leisure activities.

**Day 6:** Manali – local sightseeing
- Proceed for full day sightseeing tour of Manali.
- Visit Hadimba Temple, Manu Mandir, Vasistha Hot Water Springs, Naggar Art Gallery, and Tibetan Monastery.
- Evening is free for leisure activities and shopping.

**Day 7:** Manali – Solang Valley Excursion
- Proceed for full day excursion tour to Solang Valley.
- Enjoy adventure activities such as paragliding, zorbing, and visiting the Solang Valley.
- Return to hotel in Manali by the evening.

**Day 8:** Manali – Chandigarh Departure
- Check out from hotel in Manali and proceed to Chandigarh Airport or Chandigarh Railway Station.
- Special Note: Vehicle such as mini coaches are not allowed to enter Shimla, Manali, Dharamshala, and Dalhousie. The transfers to the hotel along with the sightseeing needs to be done on direct payment basis by the guests or Supplements applicable as per the Cost.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable - Himachal - Shimla Manali Dharamshala Dalhousie Amritsar' package is a 10-day tour covering Shimla, Manali, Dharamshala, Dalhousie, and Amritsar. The itinerary includes visits to Jakhu temple, Naldehra, Kufri, Hadimba temple, Solang Valley, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and visits to local markets and scenic spots.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Delhi and drive to Shimla (350 kms / approx 6 hrs)
- Arrive Delhi on own and drive to Shimla. Upon arrival transfer to the hotel in Shimla. Rest of the day free for leisure. Overnight at hotel in Shimla.

**Day 2:** In Shimla – Local Sightseeing
- After breakfast, visit Jakhu temple. Located at the town’s highest point, the temple is dedicated to Lord Hanuman. Visit Naldehra - 18km from Shimla. It has a nine-hole golf course designed by the British Viceroy Lord Curzon. After visiting Naldehra, we take you to Kufri, which is famous for the panoramic view. It offers scenic green valley’s view and its ski slopes. You can visit Kufri Fun campus where you can enjoy rides and adventure activities. We return to Shimla’s hotel for rest. Overnight at hotel in Shimla.

**Day 3:** Shimla to Manali (290 kms / approx 7 hrs)
- After breakfast drive to Manali. Upon arrival check in at a hotel for rest. Evening is free to visit Manali Market. Overnight at hotel in Manali.

**Day 4:** In Manali – Local Sightseeing
- After breakfast, visit the famous Hadimba temple – a famous woodwork in Pagoda style architecture. Explore the Nagar castle and Roerich Art Gallery – dedicated to the celebrated Russian painter Nicholas Roerich who married the Indian cine idol - Devika Rani, and lived there. Visit Vashist famous for its hot water springs. Overnight at hotel in Manali.

**Day 5:** In Manali – Solang Valley Excursion – (ROHTANG PASS ON YOUR OWN & ALL ADVENTURE ACTIVIITES TO BE PAID DIRECTLY)
- Full day excursion tour for Solang Valley. Solang Valley, locally known as Solang Nullah, is renowned as the preferred location for adventure activities in Himachal Pradesh. For those who love the rush of adrenaline; there is no place better than Solang in Kullu Valley to indulge in parachuting, paragliding, skating and zorbingIt is 8500 feet above mean sea level Solang is not just about adventure activities. Its lush greenery, apple orchards, snowcapped peaks and lakes attracts lacs of visitor. Return to hotel by the evening. Overnight at hotel in Manali.

**Day 6:** Manali to Dharamshala (230 kms / approx 7 hrs)
- After breakfast drive to Dharamshala. En route we visit Bir Monastery where we can visit the St John in the Wilderness Church, The War Memorial, Bhagsu Waterfall, Bhagsunath Temple, Dal Lake, Overnight at hotel in Dharamshala.

**Day 7:** Dharamshala to Dalhousie (121 kms / approx 5 hrs)
- After breakfast drive to Dalhousie. Upon arrival check in at a hotel. Rest fo the day free for visit Mall road. Overnight at hotel in Dalhousie.

**Day 8:** Visit Khajjiar (20 kms one way / approx 40mins)
- After breakfast, we visit Panjpulla, Subash Bowli, and Stature Falls. Then we will take you to Khajjiar also known as mini Switzerland of Himachal Pradesh. Overnight at hotel in Dalhousie.

**Day 9:** Dalhousie – Amritsar (141 kms / approx 4 hrs)
- After early breakfast, depart for Amritsar. On arrival at Amritsar, check into your hotel. Later proceed for Amritsar Local sightseeing. Visit Gobindgarh Fort, Sadda Pind, Golden Temple, ISKCON temple. Overnight at hotel in Amritsar.

**Day 10:** Departure
- After breakfast leave for Amritsar railway station / Amritsar airport for onward journey.

**Summary:** The 'Kashmir With Gulmarg Veg Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg. The itinerary includes visits to Shankaracharya Temple, Mughal Gardens, Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, Avantipur ruins, Martand Sun Temple, Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari, and Sonmarg. Participants will enjoy Shikara ride on Dal Lake, Gondola ride at Gulmarg, and pony rides at Aru Valley and Sonmarg. The package includes accommodation on twin sharing basis in hotels, meals, and transfers by AC vehicles.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Srinagar
- Arrive at Srinagar Airport and meet the local Airport Representative.
- Proceed to the Houseboat for check-in.
- Enjoy a Shikara ride on Dal Lake.

**Day 2:** Pahalgam
- Drive to Pahalgam (94 Kms / approx 03 hrs).
- Visit Shankaracharya Temple, Mughal Gardens - Nishat Bagh, and Shalimar Bagh.
- Check-in at the hotel in Pahalgam.

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Visit Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, and Chandanwari.
- Enjoy a pony ride at Aru Valley and Betaab Valley.

**Day 4:** Gulmarg
- Drive to Gulmarg (140 Kms / approx 04 hrs).
- Visit Kashmiri Cricket Bat Factory.
- Check-in at the hotel in Gulmarg.

**Day 5:** Srinagar
- Drive to Srinagar (55Kms / approx. 3 Hrs).

**Summary:** The 'Marvellous Armenia' package is an 8-day tour covering the city of Yerevan and its surrounding attractions. **Day 1:** Arrival Tbilisi - City Tour
- Arrive in Tbilisi and enjoy a guided city tour: Visit Old Tbilisi, Meidani Square, Metekhi Church, Shardeni Street, Peace Bridge, Mtatsminda Park, Narikala Fortress, Gabriadze clock tower, Baratashvili street, Rustaveli avenue, and Freedom Square.

**Day 2:** Bodbe Monastery – Signagi – Winery Khareba
- Depart for Bodbe Monastery and visit the ancient temple monastery Jvari (VI century).
- Visit the city of love, small, beautiful Sighnaghi, which is famous for its eponymous fortress.
- Enjoy a wine tasting at Khareba Winery.

**Day 3:** Jinvali reservoir – Ananuri Castle – Gudauri – Kazbegi - Gudauri
- Visit the grandiose Zhinvali reservoir and the impressive and powerful Fortress Ananuri.
- Enjoy breathtaking views of the mighty mountains from the observation deck.
- Visit the village of Kazbegi and the Church of the Holy Trinity Sameba.

**Day 4:** Gudauri ski resort
- Spend the day on the ski slopes at Gudauri ski resort.
- Enjoy the beautiful views and activities available in the area.

**Day 5:** Gudauri – Ancient Capital of Georgia ‘’Mtskheta’’ – Holy Trinity ‘’Sameba’’ – Tbilisi
- Depart for the ancient capital of Georgia Mtskheta.
- Visit the Svetitskhoveli Cathedral and the burial place of many Georgian kings.
- Visit the Holy Trinity Sameba Cathedral, the symbol of new Georgia.

**Day 6:** Gori – Uplistsikhe Cave Town – Stalin Museum – Tbilisi
- Visit the ancient cave city of Uplistsikhe (fortress of God).
- Visit the city of Gori and the house where IV Stalin grew up.
- Visit the Stalin Museum.

**Day 7:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Darsaniya Europe With Louvre - Durga Puja Special' package is an 11-day tour covering Paris, Switzerland, Italy, and Germany. The itinerary includes visits to the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Vatican City, St. Peter's Basilica, Colosseum, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Paris: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Paris

- Today, we visit the Eiffel Tower (2nd level). Next, we proceed on a guided tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House and Les Invalides. Next, Visit the Famous French perfume museum - Fragonard. Then we proceed for a cruise on the River Seine. Later, we proceed on an 'Illumination tour of Paris' and see Paris by night, with some of the city's famous monuments / sights lit up.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Visit Louvre Museum – Visit Montmartre
- Today, we visit the world-famous Louvre Museum and get a glimpse of Mona Lisa. Next, we visit Montmartre - a large hill with the white-domed Basilica of the Sacre-Cœur and get a view of Paris city from the summit.

**Day 4:** Zurich
- Onto Scenic Switzerland
- Today, we enjoy a scenic drive to Switzerland. On arrival, check-in to the hotel.

**Day 5:** Zurich

We board the cable car followed by a cog-wheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station. Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps. Later, we visit Interlaken.

**Day 6:** Mendrissio
- Visit Mt. Titlis - Orientation tour of Lucerne
- Today, we drive to Lucerne for an orientation tour: See the Lion Monument and Kapellbrucke. Next, we visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop in Wattens. Later drive to Mendrissio for check-in at the hotel.

**Day 7:** Arezzo
- Visit Piazzale Michelangelo - Photo stop at the Leaning Tower of Pisa
- Today, we proceed to Florence and visit Piazzale Michelangelo for a photo stop and get a bird’s eye-view of the city. Next, we drive to Pisa. On arrival, we visit the Field of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa.

**Day 8:** Arezzo

- Today, we go on a day trip to Rome. On arrival, we proceed for a guided city tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City - the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed) including a visit to the Vatican Museum, Sistine Chapel, St. Peter's Basilica and St. Peter’s Square. Next, we continue with the guided city tour of Rome: See Circus Maximus and photo-stop at Colosseum and Arch of Constantine. Later, we drive to Arezzo.

**Day 9:** Vicenza

- Today, we proceed to the pier and take a private boat to Venice. On arrival, we visit St. Mark’s square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile and Bridge of Sighs. Later, spend time to explore the city on your own.

**Day 10:** Munich

Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Turkish Panorama' package is an 11-day tour covering Istanbul, Kusadasi, Marmaris, Antalya, Nigde, Cappadocia, Safranbolu, and back to Istanbul. **Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Aonghus Youth' package is an 8-day tour covering London, Durham, Edinburgh, Glasgow, and Dublin. The itinerary includes visits to Westminster, the Houses of Parliament, the City, and the River Thames in London, as well as the historic centers of Durham, Edinburgh, and Glasgow. Participants will also enjoy a sightseeing tour of Dublin, Ireland's peaceful capital city, and a boat trip on Loch Ness. The tour includes arrival transfers, basic travel insurance, and breakfast buffets, as well as entrance fees to Urquhart Castle and a whiskey distillery. The price is 123,146.0, and the package includes accommodations at various hotels in each city.

**Summary:** The 'Kashmir With Kargil - Fixed Private Tour' package is an 8-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, Sonmarg, and Kargil. The itinerary includes visits to Shankaracharya Temple, Mughal Gardens, Avantipur ruins, Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari, Zojila Pass, Kargil War Memorial, and Gulmarg Gondola, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy Shikara rides, guided tours, and visits to Kashmiri Cricket Bat Factory and Handloom Emporium.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Srinagar
- Arrive at Srinagar Airport and meet the local Airport Representative.
- Proceed to Houseboat for check-in and enjoy a Shikara ride on Dal Lake.

**Day 2:** Srinagar - Pahalgam
- Drive to Pahalgam - Valley of Shepherds.
- Visit Shankaracharya Temple, Mughal Gardens - Nishat Bagh and Shalimar Bagh.
- Stop in Pampore for a demonstration on Saffron cultivation.

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Visit Aru Valley - offering some fantastic scenes of the lush meadows and mountains.
- Visit Betaab Valley – initially known as the Harjan Valley, this valley was renamed after the hit Bollywood movie Betaab.
- Visit Chandanwari - starting point for Amarnath Yatra and is a popular hiking destination.

**Day 4:** Pahalgam - Sonmarg
- Drive to Sonmarg (Golden Meadow).
- Visit Kashmiri Cricket Bat Factory.
- Overnight stay at hotel in Sonmarg.

**Day 5:** Sonmarg - Kargil War Memorial
- Drive to Kargil through the adventurous Zojila Pass.
- Visit Dras. Drass (10,800 ft) is the second coldest inhabited place in the world after Siberia and is famous for the 1999 Kargil war.
- Visit Kargil War Memorial, pay homage to the Kargil War Heroes.

**Day 6:** Sonmarg - Srinagar
- Drive back to Srinagar.
- Overnight stay at hotel in Srinagar.

**Day 7:** Srinagar - Gulmarg
- Drive to Gulmarg - "Meadow of Flowers".
- Enjoy Asia's Highest Cable Car Project Gulmarg Gondola - The Gondola offers all tourists, scenic views of Pir Panjal Mountains and Valley as you head towards Phase 1: KHILANMARG.
- Visit Handloom Emporium.

**Day 8:** Fly Back Home
- Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Kashmir tour.

**Summary:** The 'Uttarakhand - Romantic Getaway To Garhwal' package is a 6-day tour covering Mussoorie, New Tehri, and Rishikesh. The itinerary includes visits to Kempty Waterfall, Company Garden, Dalai Hills, Gun Hill Point, Dhanaulti Eco Park, Surkanda Devi Temple, Tehri Lake, and Rishikesh local sightseeing. The package includes meals, accommodations, and activities such as a trolley ride to Gun Hill Point and a visit to the Herend Porcelain factory & Museum.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Mussoorie
- Drive from Dehradun Airport to Mussoorie (55kms / 1.5 Hrs approx.)
- Check into the hotel and relax after your journey.
- Leisurely stroll along the iconic Mall Road of Mussoorie.

**Day 2:** Mussoorie
- Explore Mussoorie: Visit Kempty Waterfall, Company Garden, and Dalai Hills.
- Enjoy a trolley ride to Gun Hill Point.

**Day 3:** New Tehri
- Drive to New Tehri and visit Dhanaulti Eco Park.
- Visit Surkanda Devi Temple and enjoy a jeep safari in the Kaudia Range.

**Day 4:** New Tehri
- Visit Tehri Lake and enjoy water sports.
- Leisure time for the rest of the evening.

**Day 5:** Rishikesh
- Drive to Rishikesh and visit local sightseeing attractions.
- Enjoy a Ganga Aarti at Parmarth Niketan.

**Day 6:** Rishikesh

**Highlights:**

- Scenic drives and guided tours
- Visits to Kempty Waterfall, Company Garden, Dalai Hills, Gun Hill Point, Dhanaulti Eco Park, Surkanda Devi Temple, Tehri Lake, and Rishikesh local sightseeing

- Meals and accommodations included
- Activities such as a visit to the Herend Porcelain factory & Museum and a trolley ride to Gun Hill Point.

**Summary:** The 'Uttarakhand - Romantic Getaway To Kumaun' package is a 6-day tour covering Bhimtal, Ranikhet, and Corbett. The itinerary includes visits to Bhimtal Lake, Nainital, Kumaon Regimental Centre Museum, Chaubatia Gardens, Jhula Devi Temple, and Corbett National Park. Participants will enjoy guided tours, nature walks, and jungle safaris, among other activities. The package includes meals, accommodations, and transportation, as well as optional activities such as a pool-side candlelight dinner and a romantic campfire.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Drive from Delhi to Bhimtal (6-7 Hrs)
- Check into the hotel in Bhimtal and unwind.
- Spend the evening by the serene Bhimtal Lake, enjoying a leisurely boat ride or a romantic stroll along the lakeshore.
- Dinner & overnight at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Bhimtal - Day Excursion To Nainital - Bhimtal
- After a delicious breakfast at the hotel, head to Naini Lake, the heart of Nainital.
- Enjoy a serene boat ride on the lake while admiring the surrounding hills and the iconic Naina Devi Temple.
- Visit the Naina Devi Temple, situated on the northern shore of the lake.
- Enjoy a delicious lunch at a local restaurant (Extra Cost).
- Take a leisurely stroll along the Mall Road, a bustling street lined with shops, cafes, and stunning views of the lake.
- Drive back to Bhimtal and, if time permits, explore the local attractions like Bhimtal Aquarium and Victoria Dam.
- Return to the hotel for the dinner & overnight stay.

**Day 3:** Bhimtal To Ranikhet (Drive/2.5 Hrs)
- Check-out from the hotel after breakfast and drive to Ranikhet (approximately 2.5 hours).
- Nature lovers from all over the country visit this beautiful place, famous for its natural beauty and apple orchards.
- Located at an altitude of 6,132 ft. above sea level, Ranikhet is not only famous for its natural beauty but also for being home to the famous Jhula Devi Temple.
- En route, visit Kainchi Dham Neem Karoli Ashram and continue your drive to reach Ranikhet.
- Check in to the hotel and relax for the day.
- Evening at leisure. You can explore the local markets or enjoy a romantic campfire (Extra cost) under the starlit sky.

**Day 4:** Full Day Ranikhet Excursion
- Embark on an early nature walk (On your own) in the woods around Ranikhet. Breathe in the fresh mountain air and enjoy the serenity.
- After having a hearty breakfast at the hotel, visit the Kumaon Regimental Centre Museum and explore Chaubatia Gardens, known for its orchards and panoramic views of the Himalayas.
- Visit the Jhula Devi Temple, an ancient and revered temple known for its legends and intricate architecture.
- Take a walk around Ranikhet Golf Course, one of the highest golf courses in Asia. Even if you're not a golfer, the surroundings are captivating.
- Drive back to the hotel and have a cozy dinner.

**Day 5:** Ranikhet To Corbett (Drive/2.5 Hrs)
- Check-out from the cottage and drive to Corbett National Park (approximately 2.5 hours).
- Jim Corbett National Park is a forested wildlife sanctuary in northern India’s Uttarakhand State. Rich in flora and fauna, it’s known for its Bengal tigers and other animals, including tigers, leopards and wild elephants.
- On the banks of the Ramganga Reservoir, the Sonanadi zone is home to elephants and leopards, along with hundreds of species of birds.
- Arrive in Corbett and check-in to your resort. In the afternoon, enjoy an exciting jungle safari in Corbett National Park to witness the rich wildlife, including tigers, elephants, and various bird species.
- Evening free at the resort, you can relax by the pool or indulge in a romantic dinner.

**Day 6:** Corbett To Delhi (5-6 Hrs)
- Start the day with an early morning nature walk or a bird-watching session (Extra Cost).
- After breakfast, check-out from the hotel and begin your journey back to Delhi.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Scotland and Ireland' package is a 12-day tour covering Edinburgh, Inverness, Glasgow, Dublin, Cork, Limerick, and Galway. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to whiskey distilleries and historic sites.

- Visit CULLODEN, where one of the main battles in Scottish history took place against the British forces.

**Day 4:** Inverness
- Visit EILEAN DONAN CASTLE probably the most photographed fortress in the entire country (entrance included).

- Visit INVERARAY, a quite picturesque historic village by Loch Fyne with a large castle and quiet streets.

**Day 6:** Dublin

- Visit BELFAST, Northern Ireland’s capital city.

- Visit Trinity College (depending on the duration of sunlight, this visit may take place the afternoon before, upon arrival in Dublin).
- Free time during the afternoon.

**Day 8:** Cork

- Visit POWERSCOURT which is located nearby.
- Visit its magnificent gardens, designed in the 18th century and considered the most beautiful gardens in Ireland (entrance included).
- Visit KILKENNY, here we will have time for lunch and to stroll around this lively town.
- Visit the impressive Rock of CASHEL (entrance included).
- Visit CORK around mid-afternoon.

**Day 9:** Limerick
- Cork- Kinsale- Killarney- Adare- Limerick
- Visit KINSALE. Making a stop by Charles Fort to admire its great views of the ocean right by the 17th century fortress.
- Visit KILLARNEY, a tourist town in the heart of Ireland.
- Time for lunch and a walk around.
- Enjoy a romantic horse and carriage tour of its national park (included).
- Visit the Cliffs of Moher which overlook the ocean.
- Visit the Folk park in Bunraty (ticket included).
- Visit the Poulnabrone dolmen.
- Visit the ruins of the Royal Abbey and walk around Ashford Castle.
- Visit the monastic ruins of Clonmacnoise (ticket and visit included).

**Day 10:** Galway
- Galway
- Visit the Cliffs of Moher which overlook the ocean.
- Visit the Folk park in Bunraty (ticket included).
- Visit the Poulnabrone dolmen.
- Visit the ruins of the Royal Abbey and walk around Ashford Castle.
- Visit the monastic ruins of Clonmacnoise (ticket and visit included).

**Day 11:** Dublin
- Galway - Cong - Clonmacnoise - Dublin
- Visit CONG, a small picturesque village located in a magnificent lake area.
- Visit the ruins of the Royal Abbey and walk around Ashford Castle.
- Visit the monastic ruins of Clonmacnoise (ticket and visit included).
- Resume our journey back to DUBLIN, where we will arrive in the late afternoon.

**Summary:** The 'Iceland Delights - Midnight Sun Special' package is a 12-day tour covering Reykjavik, Akureyri, Borgarnes, and Vik. The itinerary includes visits to the Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon, Diamond Beach, Eldhraun lava fields, Solheimasandur Black Sand Beach, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Helsinki
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Helsinki: See the Senate Square, visit Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park and many more interesting sights.

**Day 2:** Reykjavik
- Fly to Reykjavik - Capital city of Iceland.
- Drive to Vik, check-in.
- Guided tour of Vik: See the Vik village, black sand beaches, and more.

**Day 3:** Vik
- Proceed to Skaftafell National Park and visit the Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon – a stunning sight of blue & green water full of blue, white and turquoise icebergs streaked with black volcanic ash.
- Enjoy boat tour among the icebergs on Glacier Lagoon.
- Visit the magical Diamond Beach - transport yourself to a new world as you walk between diamond-shaped ices drifted ashore from Breidamerkurjokull Glacier.

**Day 4:** Borgarnes
- Drive to Borgarnes and visit the Eldhraun lava fields - created in one of the greatest eruptions in recorded history and is of the largest of its kind in the world.
- Visit the Solheimasandur, Black Sand Beach to visit the famous site of DC Plane Wreck, its rusting shell laying on the black sands.

**Day 5:** Borgarnes
- Proceed to the Langjokull Glacier. Here, experience Iceland’s second-largest glacier from the inside and enjoy the rare sight of blue ice at the heart of an ice-capped glacier.
- Visit the Glanni Waterfalls - is a waterfall in Noroura river in Norourardal close to the university Bifröst.

**Day 6:** Akureyri
- Drive to Akureyri, upon arrival to proceed on an Orientation tour of Akureyri.
- Visit the Godafoss falls. Nicknamed the “Waterfall of the Gods”, some believe that the name comes from the fact that the waterfall is godlike in beauty.

**Day 7:** Akureyri
- Drive towards Lake Myvatn. En route, we visit the Skutustadir & Namaskard pass to see hot boiling Mudpool.
- Explore the volcanic area of Skutustadir & Namaskard pass to see hot boiling Mudpool.

**Day 8:** Reykjavik
- Drive to Reykjavik. Later proceed to enjoy Fly Over Iceland, Reykjavík’s newest attraction which utilizes state-of-the-art technology to give you the feeling of flight.
- Special effects, including wind, mist and scents complete this unforgettable experience.

**Day 9:** Reykjavik
- Proceed for Golden Circle tour which allows you to visit some of Iceland’s most stunning sights.
- Visit the UNESCO world heritage site – Thingvellir National Park.
- See the waterfall Gullfoss which is one of the most famous waterfalls in Iceland and rightly so.
- The three-step waterfall is a part of the glacial river Hvita and falls into a 62-metre deep canyon.
- Visit the Geyser geothermal and see the active Strokkur Geyser, which shoots up a column of water up to 30 meters (98 ft.) into the air every few minutes.

**Day 10:** Reykjavik
- Proceed on a Guided city tour of Reykjavik. We see the old town center, the Parliament, the Cathedral, the harbour, the Pearland Hofoi house, the folk museum and the iconic Hallgrimskirkja Church.
- Visit the Blue Lagoon. If want, you can take a bath or just have a look at this unique natural phenomenon, a visit to the Blue Lagoon is always worth it.

**Day 11:** Helsinki
- Check out and drive to airport to take a flight to Helsinki.
- On arrival transfer to hotel and rest of the day is free for leisure.

**Day 12:** Helsinki
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Egyptian Extravaganza With Hurghada - Durga Puja Special' package is a 9-day tour covering Cairo, Aswan, and Hurghada. The itinerary includes visits to the Pyramids of Giza, Egyptian Museum, Alexandria, Philae Temple, High Dam, Abu Simbel temples, Karnak and Luxor temples, and Mahmaya Island. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Nile cruises, and visits to local markets and factories. The tour also includes a Durga Puja Special Gala dinner and a visit to the Iberotel Casa Del Mar Resort in Hurghada.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Egypt
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Cairo: See the Pyramids of Giza & the Sphinx.

**Day 2:** Cairo
- Enjoy the capital city-Cairo. Visit the Egyptian Museum. Sound and Light show at the Pyramids of Giza & the Spinx
- Visit the Pyramids & the Sphinx. Post lunch proceed for the guided tour of Egyptian Museum.

**Day 3:** Alexandria
- Proceed to Alexandria. Guided tour of Alexandria.
- Visit the Catacombs of Kom-el-Shoqafa, drive pass Pompey’s Pillar and photostop at Qaitbay citadel. Visit Alexandria Library.

**Day 4:** Nile Cruise
- Fly to Aswan. Enjoy the sights of Aswan on you city tour - Philae Temple, High Dam & Egyptian Cotton outlet.
- Visit the temple of Philae and the High Dam. Visit Egyptian Cotton outlet. We drive to the Cruise center to board the luxurious Nile River Cruise.

**Day 5:** Nile Cruise
- Visit the Abu Simbel temples. Proceed to Aswan. Sail to Kom Ombo. Visit the city sights of Kom Ombo including the magnificent Temple of Two Gods.
- Proceed to Abu Simbel. Visit the temple of Abu Simbel - A UNESCO world heritage site. Return to Aswan & Sail to Kom Ombo.

**Day 6:** Nile Cruise
- Sail to Edfu. Visit the temple of Edfu. Sail to Luxor - “City of Palaces” via Esna Lock. Visit the Karnak & Luxor temples
- Sail to Edfu town. Visit Edfu temple dedicated to God Horus. Enjoy Nile River from the deck, as your Nile Cruise sails to Luxor via the Esna Lock.

**Day 7:** Hurghada
- Visit the city of Luxor & later transfer to Hurghada
- Visit the West bank: Visit the Valley of the Kings, Visit Alabaster factory, Hatshepsut Temple and Colossi of Memnon. Enjoy shopping at Luxor souq. Later transfer to Hurghada by road.

**Day 8:** Hurghada
- Proceed on a full day tour to Mahmaya Island on the Red Sea. Enjoy of Snorkeling & swimming on the Island.

**Day 9:** Cairo
- Fly from Hurghada to Cairo and connecting flight to India. Time to say goodbye to the Land of the Pharaohs
- Bid good-bye to all the friends you made on the Tour. Check-out & proceed to the airport to board your flight to Luxor & connecting flight to India where your memorable tour of Egypt comes to an end.

**Summary:** The 'Best Of Canada (Fixed Departures)' package is a 14-day tour covering Vancouver, Victoria, Whistler, Sun Peaks, Jasper, Banff, Calgary, Toronto, Ottawa, and Montreal. The itinerary includes visits to Butchart Garden, Whistler Village, Capilano Suspension Bridge, Flyover Canada, Niagara Falls, Thousand Island Cruise, and guided city tours of Toronto, Ottawa, and Montreal, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival into Vancouver
- Meet and greet with tour representative at the hotel lobby.
- Orientation tour of Vancouver with photo stops at colorful neighborhoods.
- Enjoy a fabulous Indian dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 2:** Vancouver - Day trip to Victoria
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to Victoria by coach and ferry.
- Visit the Butchart Garden.
- Orientation tour of Victoria.
- Lunch on your own.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Vancouver.

**Day 3:** Vancouver - Day trip to Whistler
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Drive towards Whistler.
- Quick photo stop at Shannon Falls.
- Visit Whistler Village.
- Take the Peak 2 Peak Gondola Ride.
- Visit The Capilano Bridge.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Vancouver.

**Day 4:** Vancouver to Sun Peaks
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to Flyover Canada.
- Learn more about the city through a guided city tour of Vancouver.
- Drive towards Kamloops Sunpeaks resort.
- Explore the resort on your own.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Kamloops.

**Day 5:** Kamloops to Jasper
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Depart Sun Peaks for Jasper.
- Changing time zones as you travel from Sun Peaks to Jasper today.
- See Mount Robson, the tallest mountain in the Canadian Rockies on the way.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Jasper.

**Day 6:** Jasper to Banff
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to Banff.
- Scenic drive via Icefields Parkway with a stop at Peyto Lake or Moraine Lake en route to Banff National Park.
- Quick photo-stop at the Athabasca Falls.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Banff.

**Day 7:** Banff
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit the Glacier Discovery Centre along the scenic Icefields Parkway.
- Board an Ice Explorer bus to the Athabasca Glacier.
- Walk on the ice up to 360 m (1,180 ft) thick.
- Visit the glass-floored Glacier Skywalk.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Banff.

**Day 8:** Banff to Calgary
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Drive to Calgary.
- Visit the Banff Gondola Ride.
- This is a Gondola Ride to the top of the Sulphur Mountain to experience the bird's eye view of the six-mountain range.
- Lake Minnewanka.
- Drive through the town and see all the iconic places like the Calgary Tower, Canada Olympic Park etc.
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant in Calgary.

**Day 9:** Calgary to Toronto
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Check out from the hotel (check out time is 11 am).
- The hotel offers a complimentary shuttle to the Calgary airport.
- Please check with the bell desk regarding shuttle timings.
- If you have any early flight & no shuttle is operational, please take a cab on your own.
- (Shuttle timings are from 5 AM to 9 PM).
- A packed breakfast option is not available for passengers taking an early flight.
- Welcome to Toronto!
- Passengers will take the hotel shuttle from the airport to the hotel.
- On arrival, The passengers will be dropped at the hotel.
- Check into Hotel (Check in time 3 PM).
- Meet and greet with tour manager at 6 pm in the hotel lobby.
- Enjoy a fabulous Indian Dinner with an array of mouth-watering dishes at an Indian restaurant.
- Depart for the guided night tour of Toronto where you’ll enjoy incredible views of the city and harbor.
- See the city’s most important landmarks, explore our favourite hidden corners, and hear the stories behind these significant sites.
- Overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 10:** Toronto
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to visit Niagara Falls.
- Drive around the “Golden Horseshoe” of Lake Ontario and through vineyards and rich farmlands.
- Enjoy the visit to a winery at the Niagara by the lake.
- You will have a quick photo stop at the famous Floral Clock.
- Later, board a Niagara Falls sightseeing cruise for a thrilling boat ride to view the thundering falls from river level and then proceed to the Journey Behind the Falls.
- Later visit the Skylon Tower.
- Ride to the top of the Tower to view the entire Niagara Region from 774 feet up above ground.
- After a delicious dinner at Indian Restaurant drive back towards Toronto and overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 11:** Toronto to Ottawa
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Checkout, and drive towards Ottawa (about 3 hrs drive).
- Enroute we will have a quick stop at The Big Apple The World’s Biggest Apple And Bakery, a Roadside venue featuring counter-serve dining, a country store, mini-golf, and kiddie train rides.
- On the way stop at Kingston, a Canadian city on Lake Ontario, at the mouth of the Cataraqui and St. Lawrence rivers.

**Day 13:** Montreal

- Enjoy a magnificent tour of this 400-year-old city, which was founded in 1608 by Samuel de Champlain on the banks of the Saint Lawrence River.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Georgia (Summer 2024)' package is a 5-day tour covering Tbilisi, Georgia. **Day 1:** Welcome to Tbilisi
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.

**Summary:** The 'Canadian Rockies (Fixed Departures)' package is a 9-day tour covering Vancouver, Victoria, Whistler, Sun Peaks, Jasper, Banff, and Calgary. The itinerary includes visits to Butchart garden, Shannon Falls, Whistler Village, Capilano Suspension Bridge, Flyover Canada, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Vancouver
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Vancouver: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Vancouver - Daytrip to Victoria
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Proceed to Victoria by coach and ferry.
- Visit the Butchart garden.
- Orientation tour of Victoria.
- Lunch on your own.
- Dinner arranged at Indian restaurant in Vancouver.

**Day 3:** Day Trip to Whistler
- After breakfast, Drive towards Whistler.
- Have a quick photo stop at Shannon Falls, a 481-meter-high waterfall.
- Later proceed to Whistler, a pretty alpine village under the shadow of the Blackcomb Mountains.
- Free time to explore Whistler Village.
- Take the Peak 2 Peak Gondola Ride to enjoy the panoramic views of glaciers, extinct volcanoes, and snow-capped mountains.
- Clock.
- Later drive back to Vancouver.
- Visit The Capilano Bridge.
- Appreciate nature from three breathtaking perspectives - Capilano Suspension Bridge, Treetops Adventure, and the exciting new Cliff walk.

**Day 4:** Vancouver to Sun Peaks
- After breakfast at the Indian Restaurant proceed towards Flyover Canada - an amazing virtual flight ride in which you will “take off” into a huge domed screen to enjoy a breathtaking flight across Canada’s most spectacular sights.
- Learn more about the city through a guided city tour of Vancouver by an experienced step-on guide covering all the iconic places like Stanley Park, Gastown, and Steam clock.
- From colorful downtown neighborhoods to culturally diverse suburbs and mountainside districts, there's plenty to explore!
- After lunch drive towards Kamloops Sunpeaks resort
- Sun Peaks is located in a larger historical region whose original Indigenous inhabitants were the Secwepemc.
- Explore the resort on your own.

**Day 5:** Kamloops to Jasper
- Checkout of the hotel after breakfast.
- Depart Sun Peaks for your next destination Jasper.
- Changing time zones as you travel from Sun Peaks to Jasper today, you will see Mount Robson, the tallest mountain in the Canadian Rockies on the way.
- The Yellowhead Highway continues south along the mighty Thompson River, with spectacular views of the Monashee Mountains.

**Day 6:** Jasper to Banff
- After breakfast at the hotel, your tour of the Canadian Rockies continues with a full-day journey to Banff, a Scenic drive via Icefields Parkway with a stop at Peyto Lake or Moraine Lake en route to Banff National Park.
- Quick photo-stop at the Athabasca Falls.
- Drive to the Glacier Discovery Centre along the scenic Icefields Parkway (Hwy 93).
- You can board an Ice Explorer bus here that will take you onto the Athabasca Glacier, where you can walk on the ice up to 360 m (1,180 ft) thick.
- Then take the shuttle to the glass-floored Glacier Skywalk, suspended 280 m (919 ft) over the Sunwapta Valley, for stunning aerial views of glittering glaciers and rugged mountain peaks.
- Later at the Relax at the iconic Lake Louise which is a hamlet in Banff National Park in the Canadian Rockies, known for its turquoise, glacier-fed lake ringed by high peaks and overlooked by a stately chateau.
- Later, free time to explore the town of Banff.
- Proceed to check-in at a hotel in Canmore.

**Day 7:** Banff – Lake Louise- Yoho National Park
- After breakfast proceed to Yoho National Park which boasts towering rock walls, spectacular waterfalls and 28 peaks over 3 000 meters in height.
- The word “Yoho” is a Cree expression of awe and wonder.
- Emerald Lake Bow falls Admire incredible views of mountain peaks and wildflowers on an afternoon stroll around this gem -colored lake.
- Natural Bridges.
- Marvel at the force of the Kicking Horse River as it cascades under a naturally formed stone bridge.
- Quick stops at various viewpoints like the Continental divide and Meeting of the river viewpoint, Spiral tunnels.

**Day 8:** Banff – Calgary
- After breakfast drive to Calgary.
- Visit the Banff Gondola Ride.
- This is a Gondola Ride to the top of the Sulphur Mountain to experience the bird's eye view of the six-mountain range.
- Lake Minnewanka.
- Drive through the town and see all the iconic places like the Calgary Tower, Canada Olympic Park etc.

**Day 9:** Fly Back
- Today after breakfast, check out from the hotel (check out time is 11 am).
- The hotel offers a complimentary shuttle to the Calgary airport.
- Please check with the bell desk regarding shuttle timings.
- If you have any early flight & no shuttle is operational, please take a cab on your own.
- (Shuttle timings are from 5 AM to 9 PM).
- A packed breakfast option is not available for passengers taking an early flight.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - Central European Ring' package is a 9-day tour covering Prague, Innsbruck, Kitzbuhel, Vienna, and Budapest. The itinerary includes visits to Prague Castle, Swarovski Crystal Museum, Traunsee Lake, and Danube River, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to historic centers, as well as free time for shopping and exploring. The package includes daily breakfast, one lunch or dinner, and hotel stays in Prague, Innsbruck, Kitzbuhel, Vienna, and Budapest.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Prague
- Welcome to Prague! Upon arriving at the airport, we will be waiting to transfer you to your hotel.
- Check the information boards in the hotel reception area for details of the welcome meeting with your guide and fellow travelers.
- In the evening, we include a transfer to the Old Town Square.

**Day 2:** Prague
- Today we will visit the capital, Prague, the Baroque jewel of Europe.
- Our local expert will provide an informative city tour, which will include outstanding monuments.
- During the visit, we walk through Prague Castle (admission included).
- Subsequently, we shall take a boat tour on the Vltava River.

**Day 3:** Innsbruck
- We will leave early and travel to Bavaria, arriving in Munich free time to stroll through the monumental centre and have lunch at one of the famous traditional beerhouses.
- In the afternoon, we will continue to Austria and arrive in Innsbruck in the evening.

**Day 4:** Kitzbuhel
- Today we will discover the Swarovski Museum, the renowned home of crystals.
- We will explore its impressive gardens and learn how the pieces of crystal are produced.
- Then we will take a stroll in the historic center of Innsbruck.
- As we continue our journey, we travel along beautiful scenic roads between the mountains until reaching Kitzbuhel.
- Take time to explore this picturesque little village, a famous ski resort where we can enjoy the snow for a large part of the year!
- Dinner included.

**Day 5:** Vienna
- Departing in the morning, we include a cable car ride in Steinplatte up to the high mountains in the alpine region, with snow 9 months a year and fantastic scenery.
- The great landscapes on the platform in the void and the exhibition of dinosaurs will leave us unforgettable memories.
- We will continue to explore Austria, traveling between the mountains, and arriving in Salzburg.
- Our guide will accompany us through the beautiful streets of this city’s historic center, declared a World Heritage site.
- We make our way between lakes and mountains in the next stage.
- Our next stop is in St. Wolfgang, a famous place of pilgrimage in Austria.
- We continue to Traunsee Lake, where we take a cruise to see four castles, disembarking in Gmunden.
- After this, we continue to Vienna, arriving in the evening.

**Day 6:** Vienna
- Today we take a scenic visit around this impressive city with a local expert.
- Here we experience its majestic avenues, its palaces, and the vibrant city center.
- Free time in the afternoon.
- In the evening, we include a transfer to the neighborhood of Grinzing, an old wine-growing village annexed to the city and known for its traditional taverns.
- Free time to dine in one of its typical restaurants.

**Day 7:** Budapest
- In about 3 hours of travel, we arrived in Budapest, capital of Hungary.
- We head first to the lively area of Vaci Utca.
- Free time for lunch.
- Afterwards, we have an included boat trip to discover the city from the Danube River, the historic “Buda” on one bank of the river and the cosmopolitan “Pest” on the other.
- The views are unbeatable.
- Afterwards, we’ll begin the panoramic tour of the “Queen of the Danube.”
- Free time.
- In the evening, we will offer you an optional Magyar show with dinner included.

**Day 8:** Prague
- We will leave Budapest for Bratislava, the capital of Slovakia and a city alongside the Danube.
- With an attractive historic center, take time to see the city and enjoy lunch.
- After lunch, we will continue our journey to the Czech Republic, Prague.
- Arriving in the evening.

**Day 9:** Prague
- After breakfast, end of our services.

**Summary:** The 'Mohaniya America - Durga Puja Special' package is a 12-day tour covering Silicon Valley, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Niagara Falls, Harrisburg, Washington D.C., and New Jersey. The itinerary includes visits to Muir Woods, Apple Visitors Park, Google Campus, Universal Studios, Hollywood Boulevard, Las Vegas High Roller, Grand Canyon, Statue of Liberty, SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory, and Times Square, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city sightseeing, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to San Francisco
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of San Francisco: See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks.

**Day 2:** Silicon Valley
- Visit Muir Woods - Guided City Tour - Enjoy Bay Cruise.
- Today, proceed to visit Muir Woods, The most popular redwood forest near San Francisco is the ancient grove of 2,000-year-old redwood trees in Muir Woods National Monument. Next we take you on guided city tour of San Francisco. See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks. Later, drive across the Golden Gate Bridge and later enjoy San Francisco Bay Cruise as you sail past the San Francisco skyline the famous Alcatraz Island and the Golden Gate Bridge.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles
- Drive to Cupertino and step into the heart of the Apple empire at this sleek and modern building—the only part of the Apple Park campus that’s open to the public. Here, you can tour the innovative exhibition space for a behind-the-scenes look at Apple’s journey, technology, and design principles, head up to the roof terrace for an expansive view of Apple Park. Later proceed to The Google campus where you can see the central point of Google's headquarters. Later we drive to Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches. Also, visit Third Street Promenade, a shopping, dining and entertainment complex.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles
- Visit Universal Studios. Visit Hollywood Boulevard. Orientation tour of LA. Enjoy Celebrity Home Tour by Open Air Bus
- Today, visit the Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars. Go on the legendry Studio Tram Tour. Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more. Experience the ‘Wizarding World of Harry Potter’. Later, proceed for an orientation tour of Los Angeles. Visit the Main Street in Hollywood -“Hollywood Boulevard” walk along the Hollywood Walk of Fame, the Dolby Theatre which hosts the Oscars. Also see the TCL Chinese theatre. Next, get set ready to enjoy Hollywood Celebrity Home tour by Open Air Bus. Later, drive through Sunset Boulevard, Beverly Hills and many more sights.

**Day 5:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas- the gambling capital of the world. Ride on the Las Vegas High Roller.
- Today, drive to Las Vegas. On arrival, check-in to your hotel. Later, explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street. Later, this evening ride on the High Roller – one of the world’s largest observation wheel.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Day is at Leisure OR a Chance to visit the Majestic Grand Canyon. Las Vegas by night
- Today, the entire day is free for you to explore the themed hotels and shopping centres on your own. OR, avail one of the optional tours of the Grand Canyon. Later, on your ‘Vegas by Night Tour’ you will be awed by the lights and huge neon signs as you pass landmark hotels such as Bellagio, Paris and others with dazzling facades along the famous ‘Las Vegas Strip’. Next, ride on the High Roller – one of the world’s largest observation wheels. Later, visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks!

**Day 7:** Niagara Falls
- Fly to Buffalo - Niagara Falls By Night.
- Today, fly to Buffalo. Upon arrival, drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel. Later, visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 8:** Harrisburg
- Niagara Falls - Ride the Maid of the Mist.
- Today after checkout, take a boat ride aboard the Maid of The Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder. (Due to weather conditions, this ride usually operates after the last week of May. We offer the ‘Niagara Scenic Trolley’ instead, for all tourists visiting the falls prior to the commencement of this ride). Later, drive to Harrisburg.

**Day 9:** Washington D.C.
- Visit Hershey’s Chocolate World – “Experience make your own chocolate tour”. - Guided City Tour of Washington D.C. - Visit Smithsonian National Museum of Natural History.
- Today, after checkout proceeds to visit the Hershey’s Chocolate World a place to experience the chocolate making adventure, you will get to learn how to make chocolate and desserts. Next, proceed to Washington DC. On arrival, visit the Smithsonian National Natural History Museum. Later, proceed on Guided City tour of Washington D.C.; See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.

**Day 10:** New Jersey
- Drive to New York City - Visit to Swami Narayan Temple. Guided tour of New York City.
- Today, drive to New York City. Upon arrival, proceed to enjoy beauty, peace and exquisite Indian architecture at Shri Swaminarayan Mandir. Later we take on a guided city tour of Manhattan, drive past Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, Central Park and many more sights. Later check-in at the hotel post dinner.

**Day 11:** New Jersey
- Visit the Statue of Liberty. Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt Observatory. Visit Times Square. Visit Rise NY.
- Today, take a ferry to Liberty Island to view the magnificent “Statue of Liberty”. Later, Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt, this observatory blends elements of art, technology, architecture, and thrill to take the concept of “observation deck” to entirely new heights. Later experience New York City from a unique perspective with admission to RiseNY, a simulation attraction that gives visitors a bird's-eye view of the city, paired with museum exhibit galleries. Soar over NYC’s five boroughs, experience all four seasons, and ring in the New Year all year round while seated inside a 180-degree projection dome that gives the sensation of flight.

**Day 12:** New Jersey
- Bid farewell
- Today, proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Summary:** The 'Vietnam With Danang - Janmashtami Special' package is a 10-day tour covering Hanoi, Halong Bay, Danang, and Saigon. Participants will also enjoy a guided tour of Halong Bay, a visit to the Giant Lady Buddha Statue, and a city tour of Danang. The tour also includes a visit to the Cu Chi Tunnels, the Vietnam History Museum, and the Temple of Jade Emperor in Saigon. Meals and accommodations are included in the package, as well as airport taxes and local representative services. Medical insurance is also included for the duration of the tour. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Hanoi
- Arrive in Hanoi and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Temple of Literature, Hoa Lo Prison Museum, and Hoan Kiem Lake.
- Enjoy a water puppet show in the evening.

- Enjoy a cooking demonstration and sunset view from the sundeck.
- Overnight on the cruise.

**Day 3:** Hanoi
- Visit the Luon Cave and the Wharf of Halong.
- Return to Hanoi and visit the Ho Chi Minh Complex and the One Pillar Pagoda.
- Check-in at the hotel.

- Visit the 4 famous bridges of the city.

- Visit Hoi An ancient town and the Japanese Covered Bridge.

- Visit the Ba Na hills and take the cable car to the top.

- Visit the Linh Ung Pagoda and the Fantasy Park.

**Day 7:** Saigon
- Fly to Saigon and check-in at the hotel.
- Visit the Cu Chi Tunnels and the Vietnam History Museum.
- Visit the Temple of Jade Emperor.

**Day 8:** Saigon

**Summary:** The 'Greek Delights With Rhodes' package is a 10-day tour covering Rhodes, Athens, Mykonos, and Santorini. The itinerary includes visits to the Grand Master's Palace, the New Marina, Monte Smith Hill, the Temple of God Apollo, the Ancient Theatre, and the Ancient Stadium in Rhodes. Participants will also enjoy a thrilling submarine ride, a visit to the thermal springs of Kallithea, and a full-day trip to Simi Island. In Athens, they will visit the Acropolis, the Parthenon, the Propylea, the temple of Athena Nike, and the Erechtheion. The tour also includes a visit to Mykonos Island, where participants will see the Panagia Paraportiani church and the monastery of Panagia Tourliani. In Santorini, they will visit the 9D Atlantis Show and Museum, and enjoy a walking tour of Fira, the beautiful capital of the island. The tour price includes return economy class group airfare, all local taxes and services, cost of visa and medical insurance, sightseeing and accommodation, and services of a professional, friendly, and multilingual tour manager or a local representative. The tour excludes tipping, cost of basic travel quota, any increase in airfare, government taxes, POE charges, and passport charges.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Jordan' package is a 5-day tour covering Amman, Petra, and the Dead Sea. The itinerary includes visits to Madaba, Mt. Nebo, the legendary rose-red city of Petra, the Wadi Rum Desert, and the Dead Sea. Participants will enjoy guided tours, jeep rides, and visits to local markets and restaurants. The tour also includes a city tour of Amman and a visit to the Archeological Museum, the Folklore Museum, and the Citadel.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Amman
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Amman: See the city center, markets, and local restaurants.

**Day 2:** Petra
- Drive to Petra and visit Madaba & Mt. Nebo.
- Explore the legendary rose-red city of Petra - The New Wonder of the World & a UNESCO World Heritage Site.

**Day 3:** Dead Sea
- Proceed to the Wadi Rum Desert- known as the valley of the moons; enjoy a thrilling jeep tour of Wadi rum.
- Drive to the Dead Sea, the lowest point on earth deep in the Jordan Valley.

**Day 4:** Amman
- Proceed to Amman and visit the Archeological Museum, the Folklore Museum, and the Citadel.
- Enjoy a city tour of Amman: See the downtown part of the capital city.

**Day 5:** Amman
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'All of Japan' package is a 13-day tour that covers various cities in Japan, including Narita, Mito, Sapporo, Fukuoka, Osaka, and Tokyo. The itinerary includes visits to famous landmarks such as the Asahi Super Dry Museum, Ushiku Great Buddha, Ryujin Suspension Bridge, Hitachi Seaside Park, and the Tokyo Skytree. Participants will also enjoy a variety of experiences, including a bullet train ride, a cruise on Lake Ashi, and a visit to the Owakudani Valley. The tour also includes a visit to the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park and the Atomic Bomb Dome, as well as a visit to the Miyajima Island and the Itsukushima Shrine.

- Welcome by the Tour Manager/local tour guide and transfer to the hotel for check-in
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

- Visit the Ushiku Great Buddha
- Visit the Jaxa Space Center
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

**Day 3:** Sunflower Cruise

- Visit the Ryujin Suspension Bridge

- Packed dinner

**Day 4:** Sapporo
- Visit the Sapporo Clock Tower
- Visit the Odori Park
- Free time at the Tanukikoji Shopping Arcade
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

**Day 5:** Sapporo
- Visit the Furano Farm Tomita
- Visit the Shikisai-no-oka
- Visit the Shirogane Blue Pond
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

**Day 6:** Fukuoka
- Visit the Shiroi Koibito Park
- Internal flight from Chitose to Fukuoka
- Witness the Dancing Water Fountain Show
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

**Day 7:** Fukuoka
- Tour of Beppu "Jigoku Meguri" Hells
- Visit the Nanzoin Sleeping Buddha
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant

**Day 8:** Osaka
- Bullet train experience from Fukuoka to Hiroshima
- Visit the Miyajima Island and the Itsukushima Shrine
- Photostop at the Atomic Dome
- Visit the Peace Memorial Park
- Visit the Peace Memorial Museum
- Dinner at an Indian restaurant with Ramen noodles tasting

**Day 9:** Osaka
- Visit the Nara and Deer Park
- Visit the Todaiji Temple
- Photostop at the Osaka Castle
- Free time at the Shinsaibashi

**Summary:** The 'Simply Georgia' package is a 6-day tour covering Tbilisi, Mtskheta, Gori, Ananuri, Gudauri, and Signagi. The itinerary includes visits to Metekhi Cathedral, Narikala Fortress, Juma Mosque, Sulphur baths, Mtskheta, Gori, Ananuri Fortress, Gudauri Ski Resort, and Signagi. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cable car rides, and visits to museums and historical sites.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Tbilisi
- Welcome to Georgia, Upon arrival at the airport, pick up from the airport and transfer to your hotel.
- Check in at the hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.).

**Day 2:** Tbilisi City Tour (PVT Basis)
- Enjoy Breakfast at the Hotel
- Start exploring the capital of Georgia: first we will walk across the Bridge of Peace with a stunning design crossing between the newly constructed Rike Park and the Old Town.
- Then we’ll visit Metekhi Cathedral founded in the 13th century and then we’ll take a cable Car to Narikala Fortress (4th) and see The Mother of Kartli.
- We’ll continue our way downwards and see Juma Mosque on the way. Then we’ll explore underground Sulphur baths (17th century) – the district of naturally hot Sulphur waters and the waterfall.

**Day 3:** Mtskheta – Gori Tour (PVT Basis)
- Enjoy Breakfast at the Hotel
- Our road goes to the ancient city of Mtskheta - a must-visit place in Georgia. This ancient city is called the "Second Jerusalem".
- One of the most revered saint in Georgia, who brought Christianity to the country St.Nino lived under the blackberry bush in Samtavro monastery in Mtskheta and put the first cross on Mount Jvari, made of vine and intertwined with her own hair.
- We will visit two greatest shrines of the Christian world - Jvary Monastery, and Svetitskhoveli Cathedral. The Heaton of the Lord is kept here.
- The cathedral was the coronation site of the Georgian kings as well as their burial place for centuries and still remains one of the most venerated places of worship for Georgian people.
- Gori is one of the important cities on the Silk Road, during the tour you will see museum of the Joseph Stalin. Georgia dedicated to the life of Joseph Stalin, the leader of the Soviet Union, who was born in Gori.
- The Museum retains its Soviet-era characteristics. The museum has three sections, all located in the town's central square. It was officially dedicated to Stalin in 1957.
- With the downfall of the Soviet Union and independence movement of Georgia, the museum was closed in 1989, but has since been reopened, and is a popular tourist attraction.
- You will see Gori Fortress, a strong fortification on a hill, from where a pleasant view of the city opens. The fortress survived for many centuries and destructions, today only the fortress walls remain.

**Day 4:** Ananuri – Gudauri Tour (PVT Basis)
- Enjoy Breakfast at the Hotel
- Ananuri Fortress - situated on the foreland by the Aragvi River, not far from Zhinvali water reservoir and about 70 km from Tbilisi, Georgia.
- It was built by the Dukes of Aragvi and its earliest parts date from the 13th century. The fortress is on the UNESCO Tentative list.
- The fortress consists of two fortifications joined by a crenellated curtain wall. The upper fortification with a large square tower, known as Sheupovari, is well-preserved.
- The lower fortification, with a round tower, is mostly in ruins. Gudauri Ski Resort - is a small touristic settlement and ski mountain resort located at the altitude of 3,000m on the southern slopes of the Lesser Caucasus range of Georgia.
- Gudauri is situated 120 km from Tbilisi. You can reach it by the Georgian Military Road for about 2 hours by car. Once many well-known writers and poets such as: Alexander Griboedov, Alexander Pushkin, Mikhail Lermontov, Vladimir Mayakovsky and even Alexandre Dumas went by it.
- Gudauri Panorama, Georgia – Russia Friendship Monument. The monument was built in 1983 to commemorate 200 years’ anniversary of the Treaty of Georgievsk (1783).
- This agreement established Georgia as a protectorate of the Russian empire. Up though the Caucasus to the Russian border runs the famed, celebrated by poets and feared by military leaders over many long centuries.
- It has served as an important link between Europe and Asia since ancient times, though it was only after Russia’s annexation of east Georgia in the 19th century and the subsequent improvement of the track for troop movements that it became known as the “Military Highway”.
- Today it serves as the best route via which we can enjoy the dramatic scenery, crystal-clear air and indescribable grandeur of the mighty Caucasus Mountains.
- Vicinity of Stepantsminda is picturesque. There is a river Thergi running below the town, with snowed peaks of Caucasus rising among which the Mount Kazbek standing out, with its 5033m height.
- There are quite a few valley glaciers and forests, both deciduous and coniferous. Fresh mountain air and mineral springs of Stepantsminda are considered to be the main therapy for breathing or eating disorders.

**Day 5:** Signagi – Bodbe Tour (PVT Basis)
- Enjoy Breakfast at the Hotel
- We will ride east to the wine region – Kakheti. On the way you will visit Bodbe Monastery. The Monastery of St. Nino at Bodbe is a Georgian Orthodox monastic complex located 2 km from the town of Sighnaghi, Kakheti, Georgia.
- Sighnaghi is one of Georgia's smallest towns, Sighnagi serves as a popular tourist destination due to its location at the heart of Georgia's wine-growing regions, as well as its picturesque landscapes, pastel houses and narrow streets.

**Day 6:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India
