**Summary:** The 'Luxury- Colours Of Kerala' package is a 9-day tour covering Kochi, Munnar, Thekkady, Alleppey, Kumarakom, and Kovalam. The itinerary includes visits to Mattancherry Palace, Fort Kochi, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Chinese Fishing Net, Cheeyappara Waterfalls, Valara waterfalls, Eravikulam National Park, Tea Museum, Rose Garden, Mattupetty Dam, Eco Point, The Blossom Hydel Park, Munnar Botanical Garden, Spice Plantation, Elephant Ride, Elephant Bathing, Kalaripayattu (Kerala Martial arts), Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary, Alleppey backwaters, Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary, Vembanad Lake, Jatayu Earth Center, Lighthouse Beach, Samudra Beach, Shri Padmanabhswamy Temple, Kanyakumari Temple, and Vivekananda Rock Memorial, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, wildlife expeditions, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival Kochi 
- Welcome to your Kochi, popularly known as “THE QUEEN OF ARABIAN SEA”. Upon arrival at the Kochi international airport / Ernakulam Railway Station start on your journey to the hotel in Kochi. Kochi is a major port city, situated on the west coast of Peninsular India. It is surrounded by the Arabian Sea on the west and Western Ghats on the east. It is an ideal starting point for exploring the breath-taking scenic beauty and age-old charm of the state. Reach hotel & complete check-in formalities. Evening is at leisure. Overnight stay in Kochi.

**Day 2:** Kochi – Munnar (135kms/5hrs) 
- Relish delicious breakfast at the hotel and post check-out formalities let us explore a few nearby tourist attractions of Kochi like, Mattancherry Palace popularly known as the Dutch Palace, Fort Kochi, St. Francis Church, Jewish Synagogue, Chinese Fishing Net and Kochi Marine Drive.
- Later start your journey to the hill station of Munnar. Cosseted by lush greeneries, guarded by captivating hills and mountains, and fringed with never-ending tea plantations, Munnar is also known as the ‘Nature Lover’s Paradise’ and will surely hold you captive throughout your stay. On the way you can visit Cheeyappara Waterfalls and Valara waterfalls.
- Arriving in this hilly retreat, you will be checked-in to a hotel or a resort. Overnight stay in Munnar.

**Day 3:** Munnar 
- After a delightful breakfast, get ready to leave for a full day sightseeing tour of Munnar. Smell the aroma of tea plantations in Munnar and spot the elusive Nilgiri Tahr at Eravikulam National Park, or Visit Tea Museum enroute visit Tea Estates. Head to Rose Garden and Mattupetty Dam.
- Later visit Eco Point, The Blossom Hydel Park and Munnar Botanical Garden. After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay. Overnight stay in Munnar.

**Day 4:** Munnar – Thekkady (110kms/3.5hrs) 
- Relish the lip-smacking breakfast at the hotel, check-out and we will drive you to a next highly picturesque destination Thekkady. Enroute visit Spice Plantation.
- On arrival, check-in at the hotel and relax for some time. Later walk on the street on Thekkady and visit Elephant Junction to enjoy Elephant Ride and watch Elephant Bathing in evening be mesmerized by a live show of Kalaripayattu (Kerala Martial arts) (On Direct Payment basis)
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay. Overnight stay in Thekkady.

**Day 5:** Thekkady – Alleppey (130kms/4hrs) 
- This morning after a pleasant breakfast, proceed for a wildlife expedition in the jungles of Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary. Note: Entry tickets to the Periyar Wildlife Sanctuary and boat ride charges are to be borne by the guests.
- Later you will be driven to the hotel in Alleppey. Alappuzha (Alleppey) is famous as ‘the Venice of the East’. On arrival check-in at hotel and relax for a while. In evening enjoy sunset boat ride on backwater. (On Direct Payment basis) Overnight stay in Alleppey.

**Day 6:** Alleppey – Kumarakom [30 kms / 1-hr] 
- After a wholesome breakfast in the morning drive to Kumarakom. A captivating backwater terminus, Kumarakom offers visitors many other leisure options.
- Upon arrival in Kumarakom, check-in to the resort and make yourself at home. After a while, step out and explore few of the sights encompassing of Kumarakom, visit Kumarakom Bird Sanctuary and Vembanad Lake At the end of the day after visiting the lovely sights, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay. Overnight at Kumarakom.

**Day 7:** Kumarakom – Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar (190kms/4.5hrs) 
- After a tantalizing breakfast, drive towards Trivandrum. Enroute visit world’s largest Bird sculpture, which is of Jatayu. Jatayu Earth Center, also known as Jatayu Nature Park or Jatayu Rock, is a park and tourism centre at Chadayamangalam in Kollam district of Kerala.
- Later driver to Kovalam the beach town located by the beautiful Arabian sea can be found situated within the boundaries of Thiruvananthapuram city of Kerala. As you reach Kovalam, visit Lighthouse Beach one of the main attractions, and Samudra Beach which is the Jewel in the already heavily ornate crown of Kovalam. After exploring Kovalam, drive to the hotel through picture perfect scenery. Check into the Hotel. Overnight stay in Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar.

**Day 8:** Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar Excursion to Kanyakumari 
- After appetizing breakfast and get ready to visit Shri Padmanabhswamy Temple. The beautiful temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu is more than a century old and is amongst the must-visit places to visit in Trivandrum. The architecture of the temple is eye-catching and represents the Dravidian and Keralite culture. After sightseeing we will drive further to Kanyakumari and visit Kanyakumari Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial.
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay. Overnight stay in Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar.

**Day 9:** Depart Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar 
- Savour the flavourful breakfast and then check-out from the hotel. A unique experience of soul probing expedition through the lush state with this breath-taking Kerala package ends today. You’ll be transferred to the Thiruvananthapuram Airport / Railway Station as it’s time to say goodbye to Kerala with truckloads of memories.

The itinerary includes visits to Eravikulam National Park, Rose Garden, Mattupetty Dam, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, backwater cruises, and visits to tea estates and microbreweries.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Kochi and drive to Munnar (135kms/5hrs)
- Welcome to your Kochi, popularly known as “THE QUEEN OF ARABIAN SEA”. Upon arrival at the Kochi international airport / Ernakulam Railway Station start on your journey to the hill station of Munnar.
- Cosseted by lush greeneries, guarded by captivating hills and mountains, and fringed with never-ending tea plantations, Munnar is also known as the ‘Nature Lover’s Paradise’ and will surely hold you captive throughout your stay.
- On the way you can visit Cheeyappara Waterfalls and Valara waterfalls
- Arriving in this hilly retreat, you will be checked-in to a hotel or a resort. Overnight stay in Munnar.

**Day 2:** Munnar
- After a delightful breakfast, get ready to leave for a full day sightseeing tour of Munnar.
- Smell the aroma of tea plantations in Munnar and spot the elusive Nilgiri Tahr at Eravikulam National Park, or Visit Tea Museum enroute visit Tea Estates.
- Head to Rose Garden and Mattupetty Dam.
- Later visit Eco Point, The Blossom Hydel Park and Munnar Botanical Garden.
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay. Overnight stay in Munnar.

**Day 3:** Munnar – Alleppey (150kms/5-hr)
- After a wholesome breakfast in the morning drive to the hotel in Alleppey.
- Alappuzha (Alleppey) is famous as ‘the Venice of the East’.
- On arrival check-in at hotel and relax for a while.
- In evening enjoy sunset boat ride on backwater. (On Direct Payment basis)
- Overnight stay in Alleppey.

**Day 4:** Alleppey – Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar (190kms/4.5hrs)
- After a tantalizing breakfast, drive towards Trivandrum.
- Enroute visit world’s largest Bird sculpture, which is of Jatayu.
- Jatayu Earth Center, also known as Jatayu Nature Park or Jatayu Rock, is a park and tourism centre at Chadayamangalam in Kollam district of Kerala.
- Later driver to Kovalam the beach town located by the beautiful Arabian sea can be found situated within the boundaries of Thiruvananthapuram city of Kerala.
- As you reach Kovalam, visit Lighthouse Beach one of the main attractions, and Samudra Beach which is the Jewel in the already heavily ornate crown of Kovalam.
- After exploring Kovalam, drive to the hotel through picture perfect scenery. Check into the Hotel.
- Overnight stay in Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar.

**Day 5:** Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar Excursion to Kanyakumari
- After appetizing breakfast and get ready to visit Shri Padmanabhswamy Temple.
- The beautiful temple dedicated to Lord Vishnu is more than a century old and is amongst the must-visit places to visit in Trivandrum.
- The architecture of the temple is eye-catching and represents the Dravidian and Keralite culture.
- After sightseeing we will drive further to Kanyakumari and visit Kanyakumari Temple and Vivekananda Rock Memorial.
- After visiting the attractions, you will be driven back to the hotel for a comfortable stay.

**Day 6:** Depart Trivandrum / Kovalam / Poovar
- Savour the flavourful breakfast and then check-out from the hotel.

- You’ll be transferred to the Thiruvananthapuram Airport / Railway Station as it’s time to say goodbye to Kerala with truckloads of memories.

**Summary:** The 'Wonderful Vietnam - Honeymoon Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Danang, Phu Quoc, and Hoi An. The itinerary includes visits to Han River Cruise, Ba Na Hills, Marble Mountain, Hoi An Ancient Town, Vinpear Safari, Vin Wonders Theme park, and Grand World Phu Quoc, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to theme parks and water parks. The package includes 3 nights accommodation in Danang and 3 nights accommodation in Phu Quoc, meals as mentioned in the itinerary, all tours and transfers, all entrance fees and sightseeing, water bottle on day tour, honeymoon cake during the stay, and travel insurance valid up to the age of 60 years.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Da Nang - Arrival - Han River Cruise (SIC Tour)
- Welcome to Da Nang! Da Nang is a vibrant coastal city in central Vietnam that is home to stunning beaches, modern bridges, and historical landmarks.
- Upon arrival, welcomed by the local tour guide and transfer to hotel to check in.
- Have your own leisure time to rest and relax until the tour guide come and pick you up for the short cruise trip on river.
- We proceed to the quay at Han river to start a short cruise trip. The cruise will start at the port, then go through famous attractions of Da Nang city like the Han River bridge, Thuan Phuoc bridge, then go back to Dragon bridge and Nguyen Van Troi bridge to come back to the pier.

**Day 2:** Da Nang - Ba Na Hills - Da Nang (SIC Tour)
- Breakfast at hotel.
- We'll transfer to Ba Na Hills, a French-inspired hilltop resort.
- We'll take the iconic cable car, which has been awarded 5 world records, to the Ba Na Hills station.
- From the iconic Golden Bridge, we can admire the lush vegetation and rich terrain of the Truong Son Mountains, which stretch to the East Sea.
- Just a few steps away from the village is the Linh Ung Pagoda, home to a 27-meter-high Buddha statue.
- The pagoda's impressive facade is a testament to traditional Vietnamese architecture.
- Next, we'll head to Loc Uyen Garden and Quan Am Pavilion for a walk through well-manicured landscapes that are perfect for photoshoots.
- The tour guide will take guests to visit Fantasy Park, join in adventurous, fun, and modern games such as Love Swing, Skiver Pilot, Fire Racing Track, Bumper Car, Ghost House...
- Have buffet lunch at the restaurant.
- Later in the afternoon, conquer the Peak of Chua mountain at the height of 1,487m – Visit Ba Chua Thuong Ngan Temple.
- Enjoy the panorama view of the Da Nang City and Da Nang Bay.
- Go downhill by cable car and return to our hotel.

**Day 3:** Da Nang - Marble Mountain - Hoi An Ancient town - Da Nang (SIC Tour)
- Breakfast at hotel.
- Morning is your own leisure time.
- Late afternoon guide will come to pick up.
- Visit Marble Mountain. Climb Thuy Son (Water Mountain) by the stone stairs (elevator cost excluded: USD 1/pax/way – to be paid on spot) and enjoy the panoramic view of the nearby countryside, and visit Huyen Khong cave before entering Tam Thai and Linh Ung pagodas where you will be rewarded by great city views and amazed by the main cave which houses a beautiful Cham Buddha sitting under a natural shaft of light.
- Spend time if you wish to admire the masterpieces of exquisite stone sculptures created by the skillful hands of artisans in Non Nuoc village at the foot of the mountain.
- Later, we depart to Hoi An Ancient Town. Have a local dinner at Hoi An restaurant.
- The rest of the time is free for shopping. Hoi An is legendary for its affordable yet quality tailoring services. The streets of the ancient town are also lined with shop houses and makeshift stalls selling handicrafts, jewelry, traditional apparel, and shoes.

**Day 4:** Da Nang - Flight to Phu Quoc (Airfare is not Included)
- Breakfast at hotel.
- You are free at leisure time to visit around until time to check out and then transfer you to the airport for your flight to Phu Quoc.
- Upon arrival at the airport, pick up from airport and transfer to your hotel. Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.).
- Rest of the day leisure.

**Day 5:** Phu Quoc - Vinpear Safari, Vin Wonders Theme park & Grand World
- Breakfast at Hotel.
- Discover a fascinating world of animals at Vinpearl Safari Phu Quoc, the largest wildlife conservation park in Vietnam and the only one of its kind (semi-wildlife) in the country.
- Hop on our buses and enjoy a fantastic tour through the 380-hectare safari, free of enclosures.
- See wild animals through a pane of glass while they enjoy their natural habitats.
- Here, you can also admire many interesting animal shows.
- This afternoon, we discover VinWonders Phu Quoc, the largest theme park in Vietnam, offering a great deal of interesting entertainment options, including exhilarating rides, waterpark slides, indoor games, street performances, musical fountains, 5D cinema, and so many more to discover.
- In the same complex, we also visit Grand World Phu Quoc. With a scale of 85 hectares, the area boasts splendid and magnificent architecture that is inspired by European cities.
- The Venice River, or Lake of Love, is considered one of the best imitations of the original river in Venice, Italy.
- Here, you can choose to sit on the gondolas (at your own cost) along the river to watch the romantic scenery created by a lot of sophisticated buildings.

**Day 6:** Phu Quoc - 4 Islands Hopping by canoe and cable car (SIC Tour)
- Breakfast at Hotel.
- After breakfast, pick up by SIC guide and vehicle from your hotel and transfer to An Thoi harbor where you will embark on the canoe for an islands tour.
- You will pass by 12 small islets and spend time visiting 4 biggest islands of Phu Quoc including: Mong Tay Island (or May Rut Ngoai), known as the miniature Maldives of Vietnam on the island, with unspoiled beauty, jade blue sea and long, smooth white sand beach.
- Hon Gam Ghi Island (Dam Ngang) or Hon Bom, you can relax in the blue water, snorkel on the coral reefs, contemplate the interesting rock formations.
- May Rut Island with white sand lagoon – a unique place to chill out and check in with Bali bird's nest, heaven's ladder, ocean net bed, sun ring.
- Have lunch on the island restaurant.
- During the visit, if you are the fan of the colorful coral reef, you can experience sea-walk exploring the coral park with 250 identical species of creatures together with the large corals reef that are preserved nowadays (at your own expense).
- Afternoon, speed boat arrives at Thom Island where we enjoy time at Theme Park and Water Park.
- By end of the afternoon, embark on Hon Thom cable car (about 25 minutes) across above the ocean.
- During the journey of nearly 8km, freely enjoy the scenery, enjoy the pristine beauty of Phu Quoc from above, record the beautiful moments of the famous in-the-earth paradise in Vietnam.
- Drive back to our resort to relax.

**Day 7:** Phu Quoc - Departure
- Breakfast at Hotel.
- You are free at leisure time to visit around until time to check out and then transfer you to the airport for your return flight.
- Pack your luggage and unforgettable memories.
- Have a safe flight to come back home and see you later.

**Summary:** The 'Incredible Iceland' package is a 7-day tour that takes you through the breathtaking landscapes of Iceland. The itinerary includes visits to the Blue Lagoon, Golden Circle, South Coast, and West Coast, with guided tours and activities such as glacier hiking, lava caving, and boat tours. Participants will enjoy the stunning natural beauty of Iceland, including waterfalls, black sand beaches, and glaciers. The tour also includes private airport transfers, free Wi-Fi on the bus, and overseas travel insurance.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Reykjavik
- Arrive at Keflavik Airport and transfer to the Blue Lagoon for a 2-hour experience.
- Proceed to the hotel for check-in and dinner.

**Day 2:** Golden Circle Tour
- Post breakfast, discover some of Iceland's best-known historical sites and natural phenomena on this popular excursion to see Thingvellir National Park, Gullfoss waterfall, and the incredible Geysir.
- Visit the geothermal area around Geysir and Strokkur before returning to Reykjavik.

**Day 3:** South Coast and Black Sand Beach
- Travel across the lush farmlands and enjoy breathtaking panoramic views.
- Visit the unforgettable Skogafoss Waterfall and the spectacular Seljalandsfoss.
- Take a walk on the other-worldly black sands at Reynisfjara Beach.

**Day 4:** Glacier Lagoon and Diamond Beach
- Embark on an unforgettable adventure with the Glacier Lagoon, Diamond Beach & Glacier Hike package.
- Discover the mesmerizing highlights of Iceland's stunning natural wonders.
- Witness the awe-inspiring sight of giant icebergs floating serenely in the crystal-clear water.

**Day 5:** Silver Circle and Lava Caving
- Post breakfast, have a guided tour of Silver Circle.
- Visit the Lava Cave and marvel at the colorful underground world.
- Enjoy the breathtaking scenery of West Iceland and the untamed landscapes.

**Day 6:** Magnificent Snaefellsness
- Discover Iceland on a bus day trip from Reykjavik to the Snæfellsnes Peninsula.
- Gaze in awe at the Snæfellsjokull glacier and visit the fishing village of Arnarstapi.
- See the picturesque Kirkjufell mountain and take a picture of the most beautiful mountain in Iceland.

**Day 7:** Departure from Reykjavik
- Breakfast at the hotel, check out formalities, and free time depending on the flight back home.
- Private transfer to Reykjavik Airport - KEF.

**Summary:** The 'Impressive Iceland' package is a 9-day tour that covers the stunning landscapes and attractions of Iceland. The itinerary includes visits to Reykjavik, Hofn, Egilsstadir, Akureyri, Borgarnes, and the Golden Circle, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, whale watching, and visits to glaciers, waterfalls, and black sand beaches. The tour also includes a visit to the Blue Lagoon and a 3-hour whale watching boat tour.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Reykjavik
- Arrive at Keflavik Airport and meet the representative for a private transfer to the hotel.
- Welcome to Iceland, a Nordic island nation, known for its dramatic landscapes and natural wonders.

**Day 2:** Complete Iceland Road Trip Begins
- Post breakfast, meet the representative and proceed for a small group road trip of Iceland.
- Visit the stunning waterfalls of Seljalandsfoss and Skogafoss, and the unique black beach Reynisfjara.

**Day 3:** Glacier Lagoon, Diamond Beach And Adventure In The East
- Post breakfast, proceed for a road trip from South to East.
- Visit the Jokulsarlon Glacier Lagoon and take a boat ride to see the floating icebergs.

**Day 4:** Lake Myvatn And Waterfalls
- Embark on an unforgettable adventure to Lake Myvatn.
- Visit the unique natural environment created in a lava eruption 2300 years ago.

**Day 5:** Welcome To The North > Enjoy Whale Watching
- Post breakfast, enjoy a whale watching tour in Dalvik.
- Visit the rock Hvitserkur and the Kolugljufur Canyon with a spectacular waterfall.

**Day 6:** Borgarfjordur And Lava Themed Attractions
- Discover Iceland from a different perspective.
- Visit the Borgarfjordur area, a series of waterfalls formed by rivulets streaming over a distance of about 900 m.

**Day 7:** Snaefellsnes National Park
- Break breakfast at the hotel and explore the Snaefellsnes National Park.
- Visit the Ytri-Tunga, a charming farm with a nearby beach that is a popular seal colony.

**Day 8:** Enjoy The Most Popular Golden Circle, Kerid Crater And Blue Lagoon
- Breakfast at the hotel and enjoy the most popular Golden Circle tour.
- Visit the Kerid crater and the Blue Lagoon for a relaxing experience.

**Day 9:** Depart Reykjavik
- Breakfast at the hotel and check out formalities.
- Private transfer to Reykjavik Airport for departure.

Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and cultural experiences.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Paro & transfer to Thimphu (55 km/ 02 hour drive approximately)
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for check-in at the hotel.
- Visit interesting weekend market (Thu-Sun).

**Day 2:** Thimphu Sightseeing
- Visit Handmade paper mill, School of Arts and crafts (closed on Sundays, government holidays).
- Visit nearby folk heritage museum and National Library.
- Visit Buddha viewpoint, Changangkha Lhakhang, the oldest temple in the valley, Enclosure where national animal, Takin are kept and Zilukha Nunnery.

**Day 3:** Thimphu to Punakha (75Kms 3hrs)
- Drive to Punakha and visit Bratislava for a mini train ride.
- Visit Dochula pass at 3150 making the most beautiful pass in Bhutan.

**Day 4:** Punakha
- Visit Punakha Dzong, which houses the most elaborated temple in the country.
- Visit Chimi Lakhang.

**Day 5:** Punakha to Paro (130Kms 4hrs)
- Visit National Museum, the first of its kind which has a collection from natural history to religious paintings.
- Visit 17 century Paro Dzong (Fortress) on foot and continue walking through the oldest wooden bridge still in use.
- Visit Kichu Lhakhang, one from the two oldest temples built in 7th century.

**Day 6:** Paro Sightseeing
- Hike to Tiger’s Nest Temple, the most revered temple in the country that literally hangs on a granite cliff overlooking the Paro valley at 900m above the valley floor.

**Day 7:** Departure
- Take away the sweet memories of Bhutan.
- Transfer to airport for your departure flight.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Scandinavia' package is a 13-day tour covering Helsinki, Tallin, Stockholm, Oslo, Bergen, and Copenhagen. The itinerary includes visits to Temppeliaukio Rock Church, Stockholm City Hall, Fram Museum, Floibanen, The Old Village, Tivoli Garden, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories. The tour includes accommodation in 3* and 4* city center hotels, meals, transportation, and sightseeing tours.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrive Helsinki, Finland
- Transfer independently to the hotel (or include an optional transfer from the airport).
- Check in is guaranteed after 4 pm, in case of earlier arrival, the hotel can assist with luggage storage.
- Depending on your arrival time, the afternoon is at your leisure.
- In the evening, meet the tour representative at 5 pm, at the hotel lobby.

**Day 2:** Helsinki – Cruise to Tallin
- After breakfast at the hotel, transfer to board your cruise to Tallin, Estonia.
- During the city tour of Tallinn, you will admire the Alexandre Nevski church and Dome church.
- You will see the 13th-14th century Danish-German castle, today the seat of the Estonian Parliament.
- There will be time to take in the views of the medieval town-wall and its numerous towers.
- After some free time and lunch in Tallin, transfer to board your cruise for your way back to spend the night in Helsinki.

**Day 3:** Helsinki – Sightseeing // Overnight Cruise 
- Today you will experience the city of Helsinki with a guide.
- You will visit Temppeliaukio Church, a Lutheran church in the Töölö neighbourhood.
- After some free leisure time in the afternoon, you will check in for an overnight cruise to Stockholm.
- The cruise takes place in comfortable outside cabins so you will be able to enjoy your first view of the calm green waters of the Baltic sea.
- Dinner onboard is included.

**Day 4:** Overnight Cruise > Arrive Stockholm
- After breakfast on board and disembarking, you will have a morning city tour of Stockholm with a local guide.
- Welcome to Sweden! An open city for different perspectives and new ideas.
- A vibrant destination where innovations in music, design, fashion and technology are born.
- A place for everyone is in Stockholm!
- From Fjällgatan you will have the view of Stockholm spread out on 14 islands connected with bridges.
- You will have the chance to see Gamla Stan, the old city with its narrow cobbled-stoned lanes, charming small squares, medieval buildings in happy colours.
- You will visit the most famous Vasa Museum and Stockholm’s City Hall.
- The afternoon will be at leisure and in the evening, you will enjoy a pleasant Indian dinner.
- An option on your free time at leisure is to take a tour with SkyView and see Stockholm from the top of Ericsson Globe - the world’s largest spherical building.
- In addition, remember to save some time to enjoy a fika – the local name for a coffee break, accompanied by cake in a cosy cafe.

**Day 5:** Stockholm To Oslo {By Coach}
- Today, after the breakfast at hotel, you will start the journey by comfortable long-distance coach towards Norway.
- Passing through open landscapes, dense forests and glittering lakes.
- You will stop for a break in the city of Karlstad, the capital of the province of Varmland, located beautifully on the shores of Lake Varnern, the largest of Sweden’s lakes.
- Finally, you will arrive in Oslo where the late sunset will enable you to have a view of the city as you enter and are taken to your Indian dinner.

**Day 6:** Oslo Sightseeing
- After breakfast at the hotel, head to a guided city tour around the Norwegian capital.
- “The Viking Capital”, has many fascinating museums and beautiful sights to offer, like the famous pedestrian Karl Johan Street, the Royal Palace, the Opera house by the waterfront and Frogner Park (Vigeland Park) famous for the controversial sculptures by Gustav Vigeland.
- You will have the chance to experience Oslo's best view from the top of the tower in Holmenkollbakken, where you get a panoramic view of Oslo and the surrounding areas.
- You will visit the famous Fram Museum - The Polar Ship Fram - is the strongest wooden ship ever built and still holds the records for sailing farthest north and farthest south.
- After a pleasant city tour, you will enjoy an Indian dinner.

**Day 7:** Geilo – Bergen
- After breakfast at the hotel, head to Geilo Area for an adventure full of amazing nature, waterfalls and fjord views.
- Take the train to Myrdal to arrive at one of the most picturesque train stations in Norway.
- From there, get on the legendary Flamsbana train to enjoy a fascinating trip to Flam, full of amazing views and learn about the interesting story of how the railway was built.
- Moreover, from there, you will be embarking on a magnificent Naeroyfjord mini cruise.
- Look out for more views of waterfalls and beautiful small villages along the way.
- On arrival to Gudvangen, transfer to Bergen.
- Enjoy dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 8:** Bergen
- After breakfast at the hotel, enjoy a city tour guided for the colourful Norwegian city of Bergen is also a gateway to majestic fjords.
- Bryggen Hanseatic Wharf will give you a sense of the local culture – take some time to snap photos of the Hanseatic commercial buildings.
- Ride with the Floibanen funicular, which will take you to mount Floyen (320m above sea level).
- Remember to take your camera for the fantastic view at the top.
- Take the funicular back and enjoy more of the charming city during some free time before enjoying dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 9:** Stavanger – Hirtshals 
- After breakfast at the hotel, head on towards Stavanger is one of South Norway’s gems, which offers easy access to the famous Lysefjord, home to renowned natural landmarks like the Pulpit Rock and Kjeragbolten.
- The city's coastal location means it boasts a lively port, buzzing with recreational boats and commercial ships alike.
- Enjoy the striking scenery from the comfort of the coach; the serpentine roads are a perfect way to admire the unique coastal landscapes and splendid little villages.
- You will have some time to enjoy a meal and walking around in Stavanger, before embarking on the overnight cruise to Hirtshals, Denmark.

**Day 10:** Skagen Area – Aalborg & Aarhus
- After breakfast on board, disembark from the ferry, being now in Jutland that contains Denmark’s only land border with mainland Europe.
- Here, you will explore the area located at Jutland's northern tip, where the Baltic meets the North Sea, Skagen.
- On the way to Aarhus, the region’s largest city, you will be stopping for lunch in Aalborg, which it has known for its revitalized waterfront on the Limfjord, the body of water that cuts through Jutland.
- Once arrived in Aarhus, which has a variety of historical and art museums to offer to its visitors, have a visit back in time at one of Denmark’s most unique attractions – The Old Town (Den Gamle By).
- The open-air museum displays the life of Danes from the 20s to the 70s with original houses representing different regions of the country.
- At the end of the tour, enjoy dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 11:** Discover Copenhagen
- After breakfast at the hotel, start your journey towards Copenhagen.
- On arrival, enjoy some free time in the Denmark’s capital, full of historical buildings and ancient streets.
- In the afternoon, after lunch, you will visit Tivoli Gardens, Copenhagen's famous and magical theme park, located right in the heart of the city.
- While the entire place is very interesting to see, Tivoli it is a19th-century amusement park with antique roller coaster & live entertainment program.
- In the evening, enjoy dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 12:** Explore Copenhagen
- After breakfast at the hotel, enjoy a city tour, which will take you to some of the symbols of Copenhagen, like the Little Mermaid and the colourful harbour of Nyhavn with its charming outdoor restaurants and picturesque cafés.
- Continue to the Gefion fountain, the Royal residence Amalienborg Palace, Christiansborg Castle, home to the Danish Parliament, the Royal Opera House, and many more sights that are beautiful.
- At the end of the tour, head to a Nyhavn Canal Tour and admire the city from the water.
- In the evening, enjoy dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 13:** Depart Copenhagen
- Breakfast at the hotel, check out formalities and free time depending on the flight back home.
- 3 - 4 hours prior to your departure flight, you will have to make your way from the hotel to Copenhagen Airport or include an optional transfer.
- Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback with our representative or via email - as your valued suggestions will be most appreciated.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your overseas tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Shri Amarnath Yatra with Kashmir' package is a 5-day tour covering Sonmarg, Baltal, and Srinagar. The itinerary includes visits to Amarnath Cave, Nishat and Shalimar gardens, Shankaracharya Temple, and Gulmarg. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Shikara rides, and Gondola rides, among other attractions. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Srinagar - Sonmarg (115 kms / 3 ½ hours)
- Arrival at Srinagar airport. Meet our representative and drive directly to Sonmarg. Rest of the day free at Sonmarg for acclimatization and prepare for next day’s trip to Amarnath Cave. Dinner & overnight stay will be in Sonmarg.

**Day 2:** Sonmarg - Amarnath Cave - Baltal/Sonamarg
- After breakfast. We will transfer you to the Baltal, from where your journey to spirituality will start. Baltal will be your base point where the trek to Amarnath Cave will start. Apart from trekking, pony rides, pithoos, or palki, (Own Cost) are available as an easy option to reach the holy cave. After you complete the darshan at the sacred cave, get back to your base camp in Baltal And Tranfer to Sonmarg for an overnight stay and delicious dinner.

**Day 3:** Sonmarg - Srinagar (79Kms / approx 3 Hrs)
- After breakfast at the hotel, Drive to srinagar, Arrive Srinagar Today we will do some half a day of local sightseeing that includes a visit to the famous Mughal gardens of Nishat and Shalimar. Built in between a period of 14 years the two gardens are a heritage left behind by the erstwhile Mughals, whose taste for laying exquisite gardens was fascinating. With a backdrop of the sprawling Zabarwan mountains, the gardens boast of green turfs, blooming flowers and cascading water fountains. We will explore the gardens and later drive for Shankaracharya Temple situated on top of the Shankaracharya Hill in the Zabarwan Range in Srinagar. It is dedicated to Lord Shiva. The temple is at a height of 1,000 feet above the valley floor and overlooks the city of Srinagar. Dinner and an overnight stay At Hotel.

**Day 4:** Srinagar - Gulmarg (90 kms / 3 ½ hours one way)
- Today after breakfast, enjoy a picturesque drive to Gulmarg - "Meadow of Flowers". Enjoy Asia's Highest Cable Car Project Gulmarg Gondola  - The Gondola offers all tourists, scenic views of  Pir Panjal Mountains and Valley as you head towards Phase 1: KHILANMARG. You may enjoy a Sledge ride or Snow Mobile ride on the snow-covered slopes (on direct payment basis) Later proceed to Srinagar. En-route visit Handloom Emporium. Arrive at Srinagar and Check- in into the Hotel. Overnight stay at hotel in Srinagar.

**Day 5:** Departure from Srinagar
- After a late morning breakfast, we will drive to the airport for your flight home.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights Of Spain and Portugal - Tomatina Special' package is a 13-day tour covering Madrid, Porto, Lisbon, Seville, Costa Del Sol, Granada, Valencia, and Barcelona. The itinerary includes visits to Salamanca, Fatima, Cabo da Roca, Toledo, and many more attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, horse carriage rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories. The tour also includes participation in the world-famous La Tomatina festival.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Madrid
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided city tour of Madrid: Visit the largest bullring of Madrid - Las Ventas Plaza De Torros, see the old town, the city centre, church of San Francisco El Grande, the fountains of Paseo del Prado, Atocha station, and many more historical and modern sites.

**Day 2:** Madrid
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Madrid: Visit a Bullring - Guided city tour of Toledo - Visit a Sword factory
- Visit Salamanca - Onto Porto, Portugal

**Day 3:** Porto
- Visit Salamanca - Onto Porto, Portugal
- Enjoy a guided city tour Porto, World-famous for its port wine, Porto is Portugal's second largest city. The historic centre of Porto was designated a UNESCO World Heritage site in 1996. Here we also visit an old wine cellar and experience wine tasting.

**Day 4:** Lisbon
- Visit Fatima - Onto Lisbon
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Lisbon: See the Plaza Reina, the stunning Cathedral, the central market and more. Also, see the City of Arts & Sciences, one of the more recent architectural landmarks of Valencia.

**Day 5:** Lisbon
- Visit Cabo da Roca - Guided city tour of Lisbon
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Lisbon: See Praca do Comercio, Belem Tower, Jeronimos Monastery, Monument to the Discoveries, 25th April Bridge etc.

**Day 6:** Seville
- Guided city tour of Sevilla - Horse carriage ride - Flamenco show
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Sevilla: See the Sevilla cathedral and Plaza Espana, followed by a horse carriage ride. Later this evening, we enjoy the traditional Flamenco show.

**Day 7:** Costa Del Sol
- Guided city tour of Cordoba - Visit Mezquita 
- Drive to Cordoba and visit Mezquita. The Mosque-Cathedral of Cordoba, officially known as the Cathedral of Our Lady of the Assumption is a former Islamic mosque and a UNESCO world heritage site.

**Day 8:** Granada
- Guided tour of Alhambra Complex and Generalife Gardens
- Enjoy a guided tour of the Alhambra Complex including a visit to Nasrid Palace and Generalife Gardens.

**Day 9:** Valencia
- Guided city tour of Valencia
- Enjoy a guided city tour: See the Plaza Reina, the stunning Cathedral, the central market and more. Also, see the City of Arts & Sciences, one of the more recent architectural landmarks of Valencia.

**Day 10:** Valencia
- Full day trip to Bunol - Experience La Tomatina
- Proceed to Buñol to participate in a unique festival where the streets turns into a sea of tomato-red chaos. La Tomatina, the world’s largest food fight, attracts millions of enthusiastic participants from all over the globe who come together to engage in tomato warfare like no other.

**Day 11:** Barcelona
- Guided city tour of Barcelona – Visit Sagrada Familia
- Enjoy a guided city tour: See the Olympic Village, Montjuic, Placa de Catalunya, and many more beautiful sights. Later, we visit the Sagrada Familia - the yet unfinished minor basilica, a UNESCO World Heritage site.

**Day 12:** Barcelona
- Visit Montserrat Monastery
- Drive to Montserrat – a multi peaked rocky range which houses the virgin of Montserrat and Spain’s first national park. Next, we drive back to Barcelona and spend some free time at La Rambla - the famous tree-lined central avenue of Barcelona with cafes and souvenir shops.

**Day 13:** Barcelona
- Fly back home with pleasant memories! 
- Proceed to Barcelona airport for your flight back home. Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Spain and Portugal tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Blissful Seychelles - Honeymoon Special' package is a 5-day tour covering the beautiful islands of Mahe in the Seychelles archipelago. The itinerary includes visits to Clock Tower, Sans Souci Mission Lodge, Le Jardin Du Roi Spice Garden, and Catholic Cathedral of the Immaculate Conception, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, snorkeling, and visits to Cousin, Curieuse, and St. Pierre islands, as well as a relaxing day at Anse Royale beach. The package also includes airport transfers, daily breakfast, and a bottle of wine in the room upon arrival.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at Mahe
- Arrive at Mahe Island
- Welcome to Mahe - Mahe is the largest island in the Seychelles archipelago, in the Indian Ocean off East Africa.
- Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.)
- Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Mahe Island Tour
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Proceed for Mahe Island Tour.
- Today explore Seychelles Island including Clock Tower, Sans Souci Mission Lodge, Le Jardin Du Roi Spice Garden, and Catholic Cathedral of the Immaculate Conception.
- After lunch at a local restaurant, you will be taken to the beautiful Anse Royale beach.
- Thereafter, you will be taken for a tour of the Artisanal Craft Village.
- Retire to the hotel in the evening for dinner and night stay.

**Day 3:** Reef Safari Tour
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Depart Eden Island Marina by glass bottom boat to discover the underwater world of this unique and protected tropical coral reef.
- On this relaxing excursion you will spend the day experiencing the wonders of the Marine Park with its dazzling turquoise waters, beautiful scenery and a never to forget snorkeling experience where you can observe a large number of fish species in their natural habitats as well as doing a spot of fish feeding by hand.
- Disembark on Cerf Island to enjoy a delicious creole BBQ.
- After Lunch if you wish to relax or stroll along the beach you are free to do so.
- You will get the chance to visit the tortoise and also do some more snorkeling before heading back to Mahe.

**Day 4:** Cousin, Curieuse, St. Pierre Island Tour
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Cousin Island, is one of the smaller granitic islands with its highest point been 58 meters above Sea level.
- It lies approximately 40 kilometers from Mahe and just under 03 kilometers from Praslin west coast.
- In 1975, the island was given protection by the Government and became a Special Reserve for seabirds and land birds unique to Seychelles.
- There is an estimated million seabirds that nest/ breed each year.
- Continue by boat to Curieuse Island, where you will visit the old Doctor’s House which has been turned into a museum and the pen for rearing giant land tortoises.
- Later on we will stop for snorkeling off the boat near the St. Pierre Island which is a natural aquarium.
- Discover the multitudes of corals and fish and if you are lucky swim, with the turtles and the eagle rays.
- There are no jetties, so be prepared for wet landing.

**Day 5:** Departure
- Enjoy your morning breakfast at the hotel.
- Later, we head to the airport for your return flight.

**Summary:** The 'Uttarakhand - Luxury Stay In Hills Jungles and Lakes' package is a 7-day tour covering Nainital, Corbett, and Dehradun. The itinerary includes visits to Naini Lake, Bhim Tal, Sat Tal, Naukuchia Tal, Corbett National Park, Garjiya Mata Temple, and Mussoorie. **Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Delhi - Nainital (310kms/8hr)
- Morning drive to Nainital, "Nainital" is one of the most famous hill stations nearby Delhi and located around its most prominent lake Naini.
- On arrival check in at hotel.
- After lunch (By Own) day free at leisure, Evening free for boat ride at Naini Lake or you can stroll at Mall road.
- Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 2:** Nainital (Local Sightseeing)
- Morning after breakfast we will take you for a sightseeing tour of Nainital drive for lake tour of Bhim Tal, Sat Tal, Naukuchia Tal.
- Drive back to Hotel, visit to Evening stroll at Mall Road.
- Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 3:** Nainital to Corbett (65kms/02Hrs)
- Check out from hotel after having a delectable breakfast.
- Travel to Corbett, on arrival check in to your pre booked hotel.
- Evening Free for Leisure Activities, Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 4:** Corbett (Local Tour)
- Early morning wake up call, time to join our naturalist for your Jeep safari (Not included) into Corbett National park, in search of Tiger and other wild animals.
- After safari fresh n up at wildlife resort, followed by hot mouth-watering breakfast.
- After breakfast we will take you to Garjiya Mata Temple located at beautiful surrounding of Corbett National park.
- In the evening we will visit Corbett Museum, a place where you can get information about Corbett Park, Famous Hunter cum conservator Jim Corbett as well as famous tigers of Corbett national park.
- Dinner followed by overnight stay at wildlife resort.

**Day 5:** Corbett – Dehradun (245kms/5-6hrs)
- Check out from hotel after having a delectable breakfast.
- Travel to Dehradun, On arrival check in to your premium hotel.
- After Lunch (On Own) you can spend your time at leisure.
- Dinner & Overnight stay at Hotel.

**Day 6:** Mussoorie Excursion (Local City Tour) (22kms/1hr)
- Morning after breakfast we will take you for a full day sightseeing tour of Mussoorie, tour includes Lal Tibba – The highest point in Mussoorie, located in Landour area, the oldest inhabited place in Mussoorie.
- Gun Hill – The second highest point in Mussoorie, offers a panoramic view of the Himalayas.
- Municipal Gardens – Also known as Botanical Gardens of Mussoorie has an artificially created lake, which is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- Kempty Falls – 15 kms from Mussoorie on the Yamunotri Road is the most fascinating and the biggest waterfall.
- Camel’s Back Road – The place offers a picturesque view of the sunset and a life like resemblance of a sitting camel.
- Municipal Garden – An artificially created lake is a perfect picnic spot with boating facilities.
- In the evening return to Dehradun, Dinner & Overnight stay at Dehradun.

**Day 7:** Dehradun – Delhi (300 Kms/ 06Hrs)
- After breakfast drive back to Delhi. On reaching we will transfer you to airport or railway station for your journey back home.

**Summary:** The 'Memorable Seychelles - Honeymoon Special' package is a 6-day tour covering Praslin and Mahe islands in the Seychelles archipelago. The itinerary includes visits to La Digue Island, Victoria City, Anse Royale beach, and Cerf Island, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, glass bottom boat excursions, and romantic moments in the picturesque locations. **Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival at Mahe and ferry ride to Praslin
- Arrive at Mahe airport and pick up from airport.
- Transfer to jetty for a ferry ride to Praslin.

- Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Praslin Island
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Day trip to La Digue Island (SIC basis)
- Visit the L’Union Estate for a tour of the plantation house and to see giant land tortoises.
- Relax on the beach at Anse Source D’Argent.

**Day 3:** Mahe Island
- Transfer back from Praslin to Mahe for eventful day.
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Check-out from the hotel.
- A boat will take you from Anse La Farine jetty in Praslin to the Inter Island Quay on the Mahé Island.
- Check-in at the hotel and relax for a while.
- The rest of the day is free for you to explore the resort and take a stroll to the nearby beaches.

**Day 4:** Mahe Island
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.

- Visit the Catholic Cathedral of the Immaculate Conception, Victoria Market, Clock Tower, Sans Souci "Mission Lodge", and Le Jardin Du Roi Spice Garden.

- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.

- Depart Eden Island Marina by glass bottom boat to discover the underwater world of this unique and protected tropical coral reef.
- Visit Cerf Island to enjoy a delicious creole BBQ.
- Relax or stroll along the beach.

- Enjoy your morning breakfast at the hotel.
- In the morning, you will be taken to the Victoria market for some shopping.

- Later, we head to the airport for your return flight.

**Summary:** The 'Sri Lanka Kandy Nuwara Colombo Getaway' package is a 4-day tour covering Kandy, Nuwara Eliya, and Colombo. The itinerary includes visits to the Temple of Tooth relic, gem museum, tea factory, Lake Gregory, Sita Amman Temple, and Hakgala botanical garden, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, traditional dance shows, and visits to local markets and shopping districts.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Kandy
- Arrival at the Bandaranaike International airport and transfer to Kandy.
- En route, optional visit to Pinnawala elephant orphanage.
- Check in at hotel.
- Evening proceed on a sightseeing tour of Kandy, including an optional visit to Temple of Tooth relic and gem museum.
- Late evening witness a traditional dance show.
- Dinner and overnight stay at a hotel in Kandy.

**Day 2:** Nuwara Eliya
- After breakfast, drive to Nuwara Eliya.
- Enroute, visit to a tea factory and a tea plantation.
- Check in at hotel.
- Evening, proceed on a sightseeing tour of Nuwara Eliya, including a visit to Lake Gregory, Sita Amman Temple and Hakgala botanical garden.
- Dinner and overnight stay at a hotel in Nuwara Eliya.

**Day 3:** Colombo
- Drive to Colombo, the commercial capital of Sri Lanka, after breakfast.
- In Colombo, visit notable attractions such as the Independence Square, Gangaramaya Temple, and the National Museum.
- Explore local markets and indulge in shopping for traditional crafts.
- Evening, you can explore Colombo's vibrant shopping districts, including Pettah and Odel, shopping malls.
- Optionally, explore Colombo's modern side with visits to contemporary art galleries or trendy cafes.
- Check-in to your hotel in Colombo for an overnight stay.

**Day 4:** Departure
- Breakfast at hotel, drive to airport to connect with your departure flight.

**Summary:** The 'Blissful Philippines - Honeymoon Special' package is an 8-day tour covering Manila, Puerto Princesa, and El Nido. The itinerary includes visits to Intramuros, Fort Santiago, Manila Cathedral, Casa Manila, and National Museum in Manila, Underground River Cruise, Honda Bay Tour, El Nido Tour A, and El Nido Tour C in Puerto Princesa and El Nido. Participants will enjoy guided tours, island-hopping, snorkeling, and romantic activities, including a 1-hour couple massage and a romantic dinner.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Manila
- Arrive at Manila, known as the “Pearl of the Orient” which is the nation's capital city.
- Pick up from airport and transfer to your hotel.
- Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs).
- Visit the must sites without the hassle, including Intramuros, Fort Santiago, Manila Cathedral, Casa Manila, and National Museum.

**Day 2:** Manila to Puerto Princesa
- Check-out and transfer to Manila Domestic Airport flight to Puerto Princesa.
- Arrive at Puerto Princesa, check-in to your hotel.
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 3:** Puerto Princesa
- Today's excursion with lunch includes discovering the UNESCO World Heritage Site of the Puerto Princesa Underground River National Park.
- Visit the limestone formations, stalactites, and stalagmites, and natural spaces reminiscent of a Gothic cathedral.

**Day 4:** Puerto Princesa
- Proceed for a Honda Bay Tour with local lunch (PVT Basis).
- Visit the group of tiny islands that are situated at the western side of Palawan, filled with various resorts and white sand beaches.

**Day 5:** Puerto Princesa to El Nido
- Check-out and transfer to EL Nido.
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 6:** El Nido
- Proceed for an EL Nido Tour A with packed lunch (PVT Basis).
- Visit the beautiful lagoons, beaches, and snorkeling spots where you can swim and admire the corals, the colorful fauna, and its hundreds of fish species.

**Day 7:** El Nido
- Proceed for an EL Nido Tour C (PVT Basis).
- Visit the Matinloc Shrine and the beautiful islands, beaches, and snorkeling spots.

**Day 8:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Marvellous Morocco' package is a 10-day tour covering Casablanca, Marrakech, Ouarzazate, Merzouga, Fes, Chefchaouen, Tangier, and Rabat. The itinerary includes visits to Hassan II Mosque, Jemaa El-Fna square, Saadian tombs, Bahia Palace, Roman archaeological site of Volubilis, El Heri es-Souani, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, horse-drawn carriage rides, and visits to local markets and souks.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Casablanca
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Casablanca: See the Hassan II Mosque.

**Day 2:** Marrakech
- Drive to Marrakech and visit the Jemaa El-Fna square.
- Enjoy a horse-drawn carriage ride through the city.
- Visit the Bahia Palace and Saadian tombs.

**Day 3:** Ouarzazate
- Drive to Ouarzazate and visit the Kasbahs of Skoura.
- Visit the ancient ramparts and the fountain at Place Nejjarine.
- Explore the labyrinth of souks and artisan shops.

**Day 4:** Merzouga
- Drive to Merzouga and visit the Todra Gorges.
- Enjoy a light lunch in a restaurant tucked up tightly against the sheer rock face.
- Explore the Sahara desert and enjoy the sunset or sunrise in the dunes.

**Day 5:** Fes
- Drive to Fes and visit the Karaouine mosque and Medersas.
- Explore the labyrinth of souks and tanneries.
- Visit the Mellah, the Jewish quarter.

**Day 6:** Chefchaouen
- Drive to Chefchaouen and visit the blue city.
- Explore the narrow streets and colorful houses.
- Visit the Jemaa El-Fna square and the souks.

**Day 7:** Tangier
- Drive to Tangier and visit the White City.
- Explore the narrow streets and colorful houses.
- Visit the Kasbahs of Skoura and the ancient ramparts.

**Day 8:** Rabat
- Drive to Rabat and visit the Hassan tower.
- Explore the narrow streets and colorful houses.
- Visit the Ville Nouvelle.

**Day 9:** Casablanca
- Drive to Casablanca and visit the Royal Palace.
- Explore the narrow streets and colorful houses.
- Visit the Place el-Hedim and the State-owned stallion stables of Haras.

**Day 10:** Departure
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Monomugdho Scandinavia with Rovaniemi - Durga Puja Special' package is a 13-day tour covering Helsinki, Rovaniemi, Stockholm, Oslo, Bergen, and Copenhagen. The itinerary includes visits to Reindeer and Husky Farm, Santa Claus Village, Arktikum Museum, Northern Lights Tour, Vasa Museum, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Helsinki
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the customs area, who will welcome you and take you to your hotel.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Rovaniemi
- Fly from Helsinki to Rovaniemi
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided tour of Rovaniemi: Visit Reindeer and Husky Farm, Santa Claus Village, and Arktikum Museum.

**Day 3:** Rovaniemi
- Proceed for a guided tour of Rovaniemi: Visit the Northern Lights Tour.
- Enjoy a visit to the Reindeer and Husky Farm.

**Day 4:** Helsinki
- Fly from Rovaniemi to Helsinki
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided tour of Helsinki: Visit the Senate Square, Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, and Sibelius Park.

**Day 5:** Helsinki
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Helsinki: Visit Fazer experience center and learn the art of chocolate making including chocolate tasting.
- Board cruise to Stockholm.

**Day 6:** Stockholm
- Proceed on a guided city tour of Stockholm: Visit the Opera House, Alfred Nobel's House, and the Royal Palace.
- Visit the Vasa Museum - Sweden's most visited museum enshrining the warship, Vasa.

**Day 7:** Oslo
- Drive to Oslo.
- Enroute, visit the town of Karlstad, situated on the northern shores of Lake Vanern, for a photo stop at Lake Vanern – the largest lake of Sweden.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.

**Day 8:** Oslo
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Oslo: Visit the Parliament Square, National Galleries, Karl Johan shopping street, the Royal Palace, and Akhershus Fortress.
- Visit Vigeland Sculpture Park and the Fram Museum, learn the story of Norwegian polar exploration.

**Day 9:** Bergen
- Drive to Geilo station.
- Board our train to Myrdal, change to the Flam railway line, for a scenic travel to Flam.
- Wander around the idyllic countryside, before embarking on a boat ride through the Aurlandsfjord into the Naeroyfjord, one of the narrowest fjords in Europe, surrounded by mountains of up to 1800 meters.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.

**Day 10:** Bergen
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Bergen: Visit the Hanseatic wharf Bryggen with its pastel – coloured wooden houses, winding cobblestone streets and old Bergen.
- Take a ride on the Funicular train, to the top of the Mount Floyen for an aerial view of Bergen.

**Day 11:** Copenhagen
- Fly to Copenhagen.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided city tour of Copenhagen: Visit the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue, and many other interesting sights.

**Day 12:** Copenhagen
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Copenhagen: Visit the Canal Cruise.
- Drive on the Oresund bridge and tunnel to Malmo, Sweden’s third largest city, stopping for a photo-op of the turning torso and Oresund bridge.
- Enjoy an orientation of Malmo.

**Day 13:** Copenhagen
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Memorable Philippines - Honeymoon Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Manila, Angeles City, and Coron. The itinerary includes visits to Clark City, 4D Museum, Kayangan Lake, Barracuda Lake, Bulog Island, Banana Island, and Malcapuya Island, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, island escapades, and romantic dinners.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Manila
- Arrive at Manila, known as the “Pearl of the Orient” which is the nation's capital city.
- Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.)
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 2:** Manila to Angeles City
- Drive to Angeles City - famous for its raucous nightlife, making it effectively the Sin City of the Philippines.
- Visit Clark City and 4D Museum.
- Check in at hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs).
- Rest day is at leisure.

**Day 3:** Angeles City
- Breakfast at the Hotel
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 4:** Angeles City to Coron
- Check-out and transfer to Clark Domestic Airport flight to Coron.
- Arrive at Coron, check-in to your hotel
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 5:** Coron
- Visit the highlights around Coron’s breathtaking lagoons and snorkeling reefs on this day tour.
- Get a picture-perfect view of Kayangan Lake, the cleanest lake in the Philippines.
- Discover the Barracuda Lake, a natural wonder that’s famous for its layers of cold, warm, and hot water.
- Rest of the day at Leisure.

**Day 6:** Coron
- Visit the tropical paradises in Coron! Make your day unforgettable with the Tropical Islands Escapade Tour.
- It includes the following destinations: · Bulog Island · Banana Island · Malcapuya Island
- Evening enjoy a Romantic Dinner at the Hotel.

**Day 7:** Coron to Manila Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - South Japan Express' package is a 6-day tour covering Osaka, Okayama, Hiroshima, Matsuyama, and Kobe. The itinerary includes visits to Himeji Castle, Korakuen Gardens, Itsukushima Temple, Peace Museum in Hiroshima, Dogo Onsen, Ishiteji Temple, Shinto shrine, Ritsurin Garden, and Naruto Bridge, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ferry rides, and visits to traditional Japanese bath facilities.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Osaka
- Welcome to Japan! Transfer to the hotel and free time.
- At the end of the evening we will return to the hotel.

**Day 2:** Himeji, Korakuen Gardens, and Okayama
- Drive to Himeji and visit the castle.
- Visit Korakuen Gardens in Okayama.
- Lunch included in a local restaurant.
- Visit the Shinto shrine of Kibitsu-Jinja in Okayama.
- Free time in the city.

**Day 3:** Hiroshima and Miyajima
- Drive to Hiroshima and visit the Peace Memorial, the Dome of the bomb, and the Peace Memorial Museum.
- Ferry ride to Miyajima and visit Itsukushima Temple.
- Lunch included.
- Visit the traditional Japanese bath facility of Dogo Onsen.
- Dinner included.

**Day 4:** Matsuyama and Shikoku Island
- Ferry ride to Shikoku Island.
- Visit the cable car up to the impressive castle in Matsuyama.
- Visit the beautiful Buddhist temple of Ishitiji.
- Lunch included.
- Visit the traditional Japanese bath facility of Dogo Onsen.

**Day 5:** Kobe and Osaka
- Drive to Kobe and visit the Earthquake Memorial Museum.
- Drive to Osaka and visit the city.
- Lunch included.

**Day 6:** Departure from Osaka
- Transfer to the airport for your flight back home.

The itinerary includes visits to Manila's historic city, Boracay's beautiful beaches and island hopping, and Cebu's city tour and whale shark encounter. - Drive to Boracay and check-in to hotel

- Transfer to airport for departure
